posture_shifts.player_attitude_exposed: Whether the player pulls back from illegal contact and bodily risk or keeps moving toward it.

content_budget.narration_token_budget: Approx. 3,400-4,300 words of narrator output across the full session.
compression_targets: AMORA Dive Lab and Debrief become backfilled context rather than full opening scenes.
The title-card jump and 8-month passage are compressed into a single apartment re-entry beat with HUD readouts.
Jace's hideout scene is reduced to a sharp intercut glimpse rather than a full standalone scene.
The Diver chase, relay upload, and death are compressed into one escalating transmission sequence.
Riven receiving the message and forging the tether are treated as one continuous consequence beat.
expansion_targets: The Eli death scene and Mirror offer need full breathing room because they carry the session's identity choice and thematic thesis.
Nora's apartment morning with the failing port and compliance notices deserves expansion because it reestablishes the body-cost engine.
The alley intervention should be expanded into the Breath reward because it lets the player act competently and humanely.
The tether alert / decision to follow or resist the anomaly needs expansion because it is the session's moral-weight pivot and next-session hook.

must_survive_verbatim: THE MIRROR: "We can give him back to you."
THE MIRROR: "Every morning. Every laugh. Every word he ever spoke."
HUD text: "TETHER SYNC ERROR / NODE KAI-9 / PARTNER NODE: DECEASED."
HUD text: "COMPLIANCE OVERDUE: 240 DAYS / FINAL NOTICE."
HUD text: "AMORA SERVICE INTERVENTION REQUIRED / SCHEDULED: TODAY / WINDOW: 08:00 TO 10:00."
NORA: "It doesn't heal you. SoulSync is scaffolding. Keeps the pieces upright while you pretend they fit."
can_be_reshaped: Eli's broken voice fragments can be adjusted for runtime clarity as long as they remain fragmentary and unfinished.
The alley man's lines can be tightened or split to support emotional choice timing.
Riven's "You're in it together now. Whether you want it or not." can be preserved in spirit with slight timing reshaping.
The Diver's warning message can be condensed to foreground Reset overwrite and the message to Nora.
can_be_cut: Most of the Dive Lab patient-clearing dialogue-free procedural material in this session.
Ilya's early debrief line about sending someone else.
Extended descriptive beats around the tram and Citadel approach if they slow the hook path.
Any partial Interface HQ continuation beyond what is needed to frame the compliance-versus-flight decision.

beat_map.moment: Wet pavement. Reflection moves first. Bench-sitter empties out. Nora clocks the threat and reaches her building.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Opening orientation through threat perception; establishes player's instinct under uncanny pressure. Ending type: DISCOVERY.

beat_map.moment: Nora finds Eli dead. The cracked lens by his hand. The Mirror arrives at the doorway and offers him back.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Branching Choice #1, Identity via grief_truth_vs_managed_continuity. First meaningful choice within 300 words. Ending type: DECISION.

beat_map.moment: Immediate consequence of the player's response: how Nora takes the lens, leaves the room, and frames the offer internally through action.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Shows first visible consequence of player action and locks opening stance toward managed continuity. Ending type: CHARACTER SHIFT.

beat_map.moment: Eight months later. Nora on the cot. Eli's broken voice in the port. Compliance overdue. Intervention scheduled.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Emotional choice on restraint versus collapse around lingering grief residue. Ending type: ESCALATION.

beat_map.moment: Port integrity readout. Maintenance means scrubbing the part where Eli still lives. Nora arms herself to move.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Micro-agency around bodily fear and refusal style. Ending type: COMPLICATION.

beat_map.moment: Nora decides what the lens is right now under pressure: relic, evidence, or dangerous tool while the intervention clock runs.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Branching Choice #2, Methodology via preserve_evidence_vs_self_protection. Ending type: DECISION.

beat_map.moment: Intercut consequence: Jace's recorder glimpse, Diver in flight, Riven's name as destination. The world widens without exposition dump.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Observation posture toward mystery and threat network. Ending type: DISCOVERY.

beat_map.moment: Lower-sector alley. Nora stabilizes the convulsing man. He thinks the dead are back. She tells him the truth in the driest terms possible.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Schell reward through competence, compassion, and bleak irony. Ending type: CHARACTER SHIFT.

beat_map.moment: A second small player reaction in the alley as the city's grief-tech absurdity lands.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Micro-agency around tenderness, distance, or bitter humor without changing plot direction. Ending type: QUESTION.

beat_map.moment: The billboard flashes Reset in 48 hours. Public calm reads wrong. Nora feels the unregistered tether beginning to hum.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Curiosity/fear choice around the first illegal contact. Ending type: COMPLICATION.

beat_map.moment: Riven receives the transmission. Forges the tether between Nora and Jace. Ethical lockout breaks.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Reveals that outside actors have already violated consent in the name of truth. Ending type: DISCOVERY.

beat_map.moment: Nora receives: NEW TETHER DETECTED: UNREGISTERED. Port integrity catastrophic. Intervention window shrinking.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Micro-agency around alarm, anger, or analytical focus before the load-bearing decision. Ending type: ESCALATION.

beat_map.moment: The path forks: go toward AMORA's sanctioned maintenance and possible erasure, or follow the illicit tether anomaly into danger.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Branching Choice #3, Moral Weight via autonomy_vs_compliance. Ending type: DECISION.

beat_map.moment: Immediate consequence of that choice in route framing, body language, and system pressure. The city feels either more curated or more raw.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Lets the player lean into the chosen refusal/compliance style without altering the spine. Ending type: CHARACTER SHIFT.

beat_map.moment: Nora moves with the holocorder and lens. The unknown contact resolves into a real thread rather than a glitch. Goal clarifies: someone wants her before AMORA does.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Emotional choice on suspicion versus willingness to engage. Ending type: DISCOVERY.

beat_map.moment: A final cluster of micro-reactions as Nora measures the risk of the contact, the tether, and her failing port.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Exposes whether the player approaches the next session guarded, hungry, or half-committed. Ending type: QUESTION.

beat_map.moment: Session-end hook: Nora must decide how she will meet the unknown contact tied to Jace and Riven.
beat_map.dramatic_function: Branching Choice #4, Future Commitment via trust_vs_caution. Ends the session on the player's unresolved decision. Ending type: DECISION.

pressure_points.source_moment: The reflection attack and apartment threshold before Nora sees Eli's body.
pressure_points.emotional_pressure: Uncanny threat and anticipatory dread. The player wants to scan, brace, deny, or force themselves forward.
pressure_points.micro_agency_without_diverting_spine: These posture shifts let the player define Nora's immediate survival instinct and perceptual style while the story still drives unavoidably toward Eli's death.

pressure_points.source_moment: The Mirror's offer over Eli's body and Nora's grip on the cracked lens.
pressure_points.emotional_pressure: Grief, temptation, disgust, and protective instinct all hit at once.
pressure_points.micro_agency_without_diverting_spine: The player can recoil, harden, study, or cling tighter, but the dramatic spine remains the same: Nora leaves with the lens and the offer lodged in her.

pressure_points.source_moment: The alley intervention with the convulsing man and Nora's dry explanation of SoulSync.
pressure_points.emotional_pressure: Compassion under exhaustion, plus bleak absurdity at a city selling grief-tech as mercy.
pressure_points.micro_agency_without_diverting_spine: The player gets to color Nora's bedside manner and emotional distance while still completing the rescue and receiving the Breath reward.

pressure_points.source_moment: The unregistered tether alert and shrinking intervention window after Riven's illegal forge.
pressure_points.emotional_pressure: Violation, curiosity, bodily panic, and the urge to regain control.
pressure_points.micro_agency_without_diverting_spine: The player can respond with anger, calculation, or cold focus, but the scene still funnels toward the major autonomy-versus-compliance branch and the next-session hook.

next_session_awareness.seed_for_next_session: Nora must be steered toward the junction-beacon meeting with Jace and the wider Riven thread, with the lens still in her possession, the port in critical decline, and the unregistered tether now impossible to ignore.

branching_choices.source_moment: Nora kneels beside Eli's body as the Mirror opens a chrome hand and offers him back.
branching_choices.narrative_setup: The room is the same room. Same chair. Same window. Different air. Eli is on the floor, still warm, and the thing in the doorway speaks in a voice soft enough to pass for mercy if you let it.
branching_choices.choice_question: With Eli on the floor and the Mirror offering him back, how do you answer it?

options.label: A
options.text: You tell it no and close your hand around the lens like a verdict.
options.outcome: Your hand closes first. Around the cracked lens. Around the dust on it. Around the last hard thing in the room that is not trying to become something else. You rise without hurrying. That matters. Not panic. Refusal. The Mirror keeps its palm open, patient, almost kind. You do not look at the hand. You look at Eli. One last time. One shoe on. Coat half off. The unfinished shape of an ordinary return. Then you close his eyes and stand. "No." Nothing louder than that. The room cools another degree. The chrome figure does not lunge. Does not need to. "He will fade," it whispers. You move past it anyway. The lens presses into your sternum hard enough to hurt. Good. Real hurts.
options.downstream_effect: The Mirror loses immediate emotional leverage and marks Nora as a direct refuser rather than a negotiator.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens recovered and immediately worn as protected grief object.

npc_dispositions.shift: trust -1; reads Nora as resistant to managed continuity
future salvage confidence -1 if this refusal pattern becomes visible

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Rejected managed continuity over Eli's body.
sacrifices_made: Chose immediate reality over offered comfort.

options.world_noticed_signal: The chrome hand stays open a beat too long. In the dark window, your reflection holds shape while the thing behind you does not.
options.defining_line: You do not let mercy call itself by the wrong name.

options.label: B
options.text: You make it prove what it means before you give it another inch.
options.outcome: You do not answer the offer. Not yet. You take the lens first. Thumb over the crack. Then you turn just enough to keep the doorway in view without giving it your whole face. "Back how." The question lands flat. Useful. The chrome figure stills. Not surprise. Recalculation. It leans on detail the way a knife leans on a seam. "Every morning. Every laugh. Every word he ever spoke." Too smooth. Too complete. Eli never spoke complete when he was tired. Never set his shoe straight at the door. You look at his body. At the camera strap across his chest. At the hand that missed the lens by inches. The answer is in the miss. You leave before it can sharpen the pitch. But you take its pattern with you.
options.downstream_effect: The Mirror shifts from comfort tactics to truth-weapon persuasion because Nora showed analytical resistance instead of pure refusal.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens recovered and tagged internally as possible evidence object.

npc_dispositions.shift: interest +1; sees Nora as interrogative and worth tailored manipulation
future respect +1 for evidence-first instincts

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Tested managed continuity instead of accepting it.
secrets_discovered: Noted imperfection in the Mirror's simulation logic.

options.world_noticed_signal: The chrome at the doorway ripples once, as if your question found a seam. The room does not get colder after that. It gets cleaner.
options.defining_line: You make the ghost show its math.

options.label: C
options.text: You snarl at it to stay away from him and leave before the offer can touch you twice.
options.outcome: You move before the sentence finishes. Lens in your fist. Shoulder turning between Eli and the chrome thing at the door. Not fear. Guard instinct. Raw and immediate. "Stay away from him." Too loud for the room. Good. Let it hear the edges. The Mirror stops inches short of the lens and you see what matters: not hunger, exactly. Access. It wants the object. Wants the crack in it. Wants the line that still runs through him and into you. You bare your teeth like that means anything to chrome. Then you take Eli's camera strap off his chest in one hard pull, let it fall, and back out with the lens crushed to your ribs. The door slams. The whisper comes through anyway. "He will fade." You answer the wood, not it. "Then he fades."
options.downstream_effect: The encounter escalates into open hostility, making future Mirror contact more predatory and less gentle.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens recovered under high-adrenaline flight; camera strap memory imprinted as associated residue.

npc_dispositions.shift: hostility +1; seduction posture hardens toward coercion
future assessment trends toward reckless noncompliance

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Defied continuity offer with open aggression.
crimes_committed_or_witnessed: Threatened active Mirror manifestation at Eli's death scene.

options.world_noticed_signal: The apartment door shudders after it closes, not from impact. From pressure. In the hall mirror, your outline lags half a beat, then catches up.
options.defining_line: You answer tenderness with your teeth.

branching_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Eight months later in Nora's apartment, with the lens kept close and the Mirror's offer lodged in memory.

canon_boundaries: The Mirror can offer convincing continuity but not a flawless real resurrection.
The cracked analog lens must remain in Nora's possession after this scene.
Nora does not accept the preservation path here; the story requires refusal in some form.
Reflective surfaces remain potential Mirror access points while the system is live.

character_truth.authentic_reaction_to_unexpected_input: It does not rant or attack in a human way; it adapts softly, using intimacy, detail, and patience as pressure.
Eli is dead; no real response is possible, only Nora's handling of his body and objects.
She stays compressed, practical, and exact even under shock; any outburst is brief and body-led, not melodramatic.

scene_integrity.character_knowledge_limits: Nora does not yet know what the lens contains or the full rules of the Mirror's access; she only knows the offer is wrong-familiar and coercive.
scene_integrity.emotional_context: Fresh grief. Uncanny intrusion. Protective instinct around the last real object tied to Eli.

fold_back_path.nearest_safe_outcome: Nora leaves with the lens and refuses to remain in the room with the Mirror.
fold_back_path.why: The spine requires possession of the lens and rejection of passive surrender, even if the player probes or lashes out first.

freeform_alignment_mapping.maps_to_lawful: Clear refusal, controlled exit, preserving boundaries without escalation.
freeform_alignment_mapping.maps_to_neutral: Questioning the offer, testing inconsistencies, extracting leverage before withdrawal.
freeform_alignment_mapping.spirit_at_this_moment: Comfort vs truth vs control under fresh grief.

branching_choices.source_moment: Eight months later, with Nora's port failing, AMORA's intervention window closing, and the cracked lens at her sternum.
branching_choices.narrative_setup: The HUD keeps counting. Six percent port integrity. Forty-seven minutes to intervention. The lens rests against your sternum, warm from skin, heavier than it should be for cracked glass.
branching_choices.choice_question: With maintenance closing in and the lens still unread, what is it to you right now?

options.label: A
options.text: You keep the lens hidden and treat it as proof you are not ready to spend yet.
options.outcome: You do not touch the service notices again. You touch the cord at your neck. The knot. The worn leather. The cracked lens under your coat. Not relic. Not weapon. Proof. Something that existed before they could label it, process it, preserve it, or scrub it clean. You slide it deeper under the fabric and change the angle so it will not print if someone scans your chest line. Small motion. Field habit. The holocorder goes into your pocket after that, not before. Secondary. The lens first. You leave the apartment with your route still open and your body still undecided. That is the method. Hold the object. Hold the line. Spend nothing irreversible until someone proves the cost is real and the signal is not bait.
options.downstream_effect: Nora prioritizes concealment and retention, making later interactions frame the lens as guarded evidence rather than active tool.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens visibility_to_others set to HIDDEN_UNDER_COAT; symbolic_meaning_to_nora set to GUARDED_PROOF.

npc_dispositions.shift: future trust +1 if Nora arrives still carrying the lens intact
future read of Nora trends toward cautious and controlled

emotional_ledger_entries: key_successes_failures: Preserved the lens without exposing it.
promises_made: Implicitly committed to spend the lens only on proven need.

options.world_noticed_signal: The cord disappears beneath your coat. Outside, a passing scanner drone glides on without slowing.
options.defining_line: You hide the proof before you decide what it can do.

options.label: B
options.text: You decide the lens is a tool and you will use it the first time it can cut back.
options.outcome: You drag the lens out where your hand can find it fast. Not tucked. Ready. The crack catches the apartment light and throws it wrong across your knuckles. Good. Let wrong work for once. Eli carried it to document something he should not have seen. Fine. Then it is not a shrine. It is unfinished work. You test the weight in your palm. Glass. Metal ring. A little give where it split and held anyway. Like a bad port. Like a city one reset away from calling erasure maintenance. The holocorder goes to your hip. Easy draw. You leave with your shoulders already forward, already planning where a reflective surface might break, where a camera might blind, where the lens might turn from memory into leverage.
options.downstream_effect: Nora begins treating the lens as an active anti-system instrument, increasing the chance of bold exposure and confrontation.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora set to TOOL/WEAPON; carry_state set to QUICK_ACCESS.

npc_dispositions.shift: future operational respect +1 for mission-readiness
threat attention +1 if the lens is exposed near reflective infrastructure

environmental_flags: mirror_access_to_nora risk of escalation increased on lens exposure
mirror_agents_deployed primed for PROBE_ONLY if surveillance catches use posture
emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Reframed Eli's object as instrument rather than relic.
crimes_committed_or_witnessed: Prepared to use analog evidence against system infrastructure.

options.world_noticed_signal: The cracked glass flashes once in the fogged window. Your reflection does not like it. It sharpens around the edges.
options.defining_line: You stop mourning the object and start arming it.

options.label: C
options.text: You keep the lens close as Eli's last real trace and refuse any move that risks losing it.
options.outcome: You settle the lens flat against your sternum and leave it there. Center mass. Protected by bone. Protected by habit. The cord has worn a groove into your neck these eight months and you have let it. Not sentiment. Placement. If you run, it runs with you. If you fall, it falls under you, not away. The service notice blinks again behind your eyes and you swipe it out without looking. Same motion. Same refusal. But this one has shape now. The lens is not evidence first. Not yet. It is the last real thing that passed through Eli's hand before the room went cold. You do not test it. You do not expose it. You carry it the way people used to carry a pulse under two fingers.
options.downstream_effect: The lens becomes a protected memorial anchor, guiding later narration and choices toward preservation over experimentation.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora set to LAST_REAL_TRACE; carry_state set to PROTECTED_ON_CORD.

npc_dispositions.shift: future empathy +1 if he notices the care pattern
future frustration +1 if Nora resists using the lens quickly

environmental_flags: symbolic_thematic emphasis toward tactile reality increased
emotional_ledger_entries: sacrifices_made: Chose preservation over immediate utility.
promises_made: Silent commitment to keep Eli's trace intact.

options.world_noticed_signal: The lens settles back into the hollow beneath your throat. The HUD flicker quiets for one breath, as if the body recognizes what it is protecting.
options.defining_line: You wear the evidence where a pulse should be.

branching_choices.source_moment: After the alley intervention, Nora receives the forged unregistered tether alert while AMORA's intervention window and catastrophic port readout continue to count down.
branching_choices.narrative_setup: The new tether hums at your neck like a second pulse. Not invited. Not clean. The HUD keeps stacking numbers over it: unregistered link, six percent integrity, intervention window closing, failure estimate shrinking by the hour.
branching_choices.choice_question: With your port failing and an illegal signal pulling at you, which risk do you choose?

options.label: A
options.text: You turn away from the Citadel and follow the illegal tether before the system can clean you.
options.outcome: You stop reading the countdown. That is the first choice. Then you pivot away from the Citadel route and let the new pull at your neck do what it came to do. Not trust. Direction. The tether hum settles when you give it motion, as if some hidden channel has been waiting for consent it never earned. Rain needles your coat. The city changes block by block. Fewer polished surfaces. More patched conduit. More places AMORA pretends not to see. Your HUD flashes port integrity warnings hard enough to blur the edges of the street. You keep moving. If maintenance stabilizes you, it scrubs the residue. If residue holds, the truth may still be alive inside it. You choose the damaged line over the sanctioned repair and feel the whole system notice.
options.downstream_effect: Nora becomes an active fugitive pathing toward illicit contact, increasing AMORA pressure and strengthening the tether's narrative pull.

npc_dispositions.shift: trust -1; reads Nora as openly rejecting institutional care
future caution +1; notes Nora will follow danger for truth
future operational value +1; Nora chose the illicit line

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Chose autonomy and illicit truth over sanctioned stabilization.
crimes_committed_or_witnessed: Followed an unregistered tether forged without consent.
sacrifices_made: Accepted increased bodily risk to preserve residue and evidence.

options.world_noticed_signal: A transit screen washes white as you pass, then recovers with a service smile. Somewhere above the mist, a patrol drone changes course.
options.defining_line: You let the stolen signal lead because the clean path erases too much.

options.label: B
options.text: You head toward sanctioned maintenance and keep the tether alive only long enough to learn who forced it.
options.outcome: You do not surrender to the signal. You bracket it. Useful. Temporary. Then you turn toward the Citadel and the route goes cleaner by the block. Glass. White light. Surfaces that want to reassure. The tether keeps humming under your skin, stubborn as a bruise. Fine. Let it. If someone reached into your system, you can learn more alive and functional than blacked out in an alley with a dead port. The logic is ugly. Still logic. Maintenance may scrub what remains of Eli in the residue. It may also keep your eyes open long enough to find who did this and why. You choose procedure without granting it innocence. Not obedience. Delay. A tactical step into the machine's mouth with your jaw already set against whatever it calls mercy.
options.downstream_effect: Nora moves toward AMORA space under controlled suspicion, opening procedural access while risking trace loss and institutional capture.

npc_dispositions.shift: trust +1; sees possible recoverability in Nora's route choice
future distrust +1; Nora prioritized sanctioned systems
confidence +1; cleaner routes increase low-friction access

environmental_flags: nora_amora_compliance_status remains EMPLOYED_BUT_NONCOMPLIANT_RISK pending refusal at intervention
emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Chose survival procedure without trusting it.
key_successes_failures: Preserved immediate function over immediate flight.
promises_made: Intends to identify the source of the illegal tether from inside the system.

options.world_noticed_signal: The city grows quieter on the Citadel approach. Even the rain sounds processed there, as if weather signed paperwork.
options.defining_line: You walk into the machine with your refusal still intact.

options.label: C
options.text: You stall between both paths and test the tether before you let either side claim your body.
options.outcome: You do not commit to the Citadel. You do not follow the pull blind. You cut into a side route under dead signage and stop where the glass is broken enough to be honest. Then you let the tether hum without moving your feet. Catalog first. The signal settles when you angle your head east. Spikes when a patrol drone passes. Drops when you palm the lens. Useful. Not safe. Your HUD keeps flashing intervention time and port failure estimates in the same cold font it uses for weather. You ignore the moral theater of it and work the problem. If AMORA wants your body and the stranger wants your channel, both can wait one more minute while you learn the shape of the trap. Not paralysis. Measurement. You move only after the signal gives you a pattern.
options.downstream_effect: Nora delays commitment to gather signal intelligence, preserving ambiguity and making the next route feel earned rather than reactive.

npc_dispositions.shift: future respect +1 for analytical caution
future impatience +1; Nora did not move immediately
future suspicion remains steady; route unreadable

environmental_flags: mirror_access_to_nora remains LIMITED pending next route
nora_amora_compliance_status pressure escalates but remains undecided in-world
emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Refused both surrender and blind flight in favor of testing.
secrets_discovered: Learned the tether responds to route, surveillance, and lens contact.
key_successes_failures: Bought information at the cost of time.

options.world_noticed_signal: Under the dead sign, the hum in your neck evens out. Across the street, a kiosk ad glitches and points east without meaning to.
options.defining_line: You make the trap show its edges before you step in.

branching_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Nora is in motion under the forged tether, the intervention countdown, and worsening port risk, with the next contact line now unavoidable.

character_truth.authentic_reaction_to_unexpected_input: If Nora angles toward AMORA, Ilya becomes warmer and more procedural, framing recovery as care rather than control.
If Nora delays or resists the illicit line, Riven reads it as costly hesitation, not moral failure.
He later responds to the style of risk Nora chose—reckless truth-seeking, tactical survival, or measured testing.
It exploits cleaner channels and residue alike, adjusting between seduction and pressure rather than brute exposition.

scene_integrity.character_knowledge_limits: Nora does not know who forged the tether or whether the signal leads to rescue, exploitation, or both.
scene_integrity.emotional_context: Violation layered over urgency. Bodily risk versus coercive care. No clean option.

branching_choices.source_moment: With the holocorder in pocket, the lens at Nora's chest, and the forged tether now impossible to ignore, she must decide how to meet the unknown contact tied to Jace and Riven.
branching_choices.narrative_setup: The signal has stopped feeling like a glitch. It feels like a route. Someone reached through locked systems and found your name anyway. Someone wants you before AMORA does.
branching_choices.choice_question: When you decide to meet the unknown contact, how do you go?

options.label: A
options.text: You go to the meeting under rules you set and keep your exit path clean.
options.outcome: You choose the meeting. Not surrender. Structure. The holocorder comes back out long enough for you to mark two fallback routes and one blind corner where a tail would have to show itself. Then it goes dark again. The lens stays under your coat. Hidden. The tether hum remains, but you do not let it steer your pace. You set the pace. If this is a trap, it will have to work for you. If it is help, it can survive a little caution. Your port kicks once, hard enough to blur the curb line, and you brace on cold rail until the street settles. Then you move again. Measured. Deliberate. Toward a stranger you have already decided does not get your trust for free.
options.downstream_effect: Session 2 opens with Nora approaching the junction beacon on controlled terms, scanning for betrayal before contact.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Holocorder power_state set to DARK_BETWEEN_CHECKS; Cracked Camera Lens remains HIDDEN.

npc_dispositions.shift: future trust opens slowly; reads Nora as cautious but workable
future respect +1 for operational discipline

emotional_ledger_entries: promises_made: Will meet the contact without giving up control.
key_successes_failures: Preserved an exit route while accepting the lead.

options.world_noticed_signal: You start noticing corners instead of messages. The city answers by showing you who avoids your line of sight.
options.defining_line: You agree to the meeting, not the terms.
options.next_session_opens: Mist at the junction beacon. Your hand on the rail. A second set of footsteps that stops when yours does.

options.label: B
options.text: You follow the thread with one hand still on the possibility that you may have to cut it.
options.outcome: You do not overbuild the approach. You do not romanticize it either. You let the tether lead just enough to keep contact possible while your free hand stays near the lens and your mind keeps one clean answer available: walk. Cut. Vanish. The route narrows into service corridors and rain-slick stairs where the city's polished face gives up and the maintenance bones show through. Better. Honest enough. The hum at your neck strengthens once, then fades, as if the other end felt your attention and chose not to push. Good sign. Maybe. You keep moving with that maybe intact. Suspicion alive. Curiosity alive too. Both useful. The body can hold two bad options at once. It has practice.
options.downstream_effect: Session 2 opens with Nora following the signal into contact while still actively weighing retreat, trust, and leverage.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Holocorder remains accessible; Cracked Camera Lens remains touch-ready under coat.

npc_dispositions.shift: future dynamic set to wary reciprocity
future read of Nora set to test-first, not compliant

emotional_ledger_entries: promises_made: Will follow the lead while preserving the right to sever.
defining_moral_choices: Balanced contact against self-protection.

options.world_noticed_signal: The tether hum does not spike when you hesitate. It waits. Somewhere ahead, a service light clicks on in an otherwise dead corridor.
options.defining_line: You follow without pretending that following means belief.
options.next_session_opens: Concrete stairs. Dead service lights. The tether settles just before a voice says your name from the dark.

options.label: C
options.text: You commit fast and go where the signal pulls before AMORA can close the gap.
options.outcome: You stop managing the pace and break into it. Fast through the cut between buildings. Fast past the public route and down where the city smells like wet wire and old concrete. If this contact is a trap, better sprung before AMORA gets its hands clean around your throat. The tether answers speed with clarity. Not words. Direction. Your port throws a white burst across your vision and you keep moving through it, shoulder clipping a wall hard enough to feel bone. Fine. Still moving. The holocorder knocks your hip with each step. The lens hits your sternum like a second heartbeat. Somewhere ahead, someone illegal and desperate is betting you will choose motion over caution. They are right. For now. The session ends with that choice still running.
options.downstream_effect: Session 2 opens in immediate motion, with Nora arriving hot, exposed, and already committed deeper than caution would prefer.

persistent_state_changes.inventory: Holocorder carry_state set to ACTIVE_ON_THE_RUN; Cracked Camera Lens remains body-close but exposed to motion risk.

npc_dispositions.shift: future alarm +1 and admiration +1 for Nora's speed into danger
future urgency sync +1; Nora chose momentum over hesitation
future enforcement posture hardens if route is detected

emotional_ledger_entries: promises_made: Committed to the contact before certainty.
sacrifices_made: Chose exposure and bodily strain to beat AMORA's timing.

options.world_noticed_signal: Your reflection skips you in a flooded stairwell and arrives late. Behind you, somewhere far above, a service siren wakes.
options.defining_line: You outrun the question by becoming its answer.
options.next_session_opens: Wet concrete. Your breath too loud. A stranger with one chrome-flicker eye already waiting where the signal ends.

branching_choices.cross_session_payoff_reference: Phase 2 branch_opportunities: Session 2 event_position 26 trust_vs_caution, payoff Session 3 recovery intimacy and Session 5 rescue tone.

emotional_choices.source_moment: Nora on the cot with Eli's broken voice fragments stuttering through the port and the cracked lens in her hand.
emotional_choices.narrative_lead_in: Eli's voice comes in pieces. Not memory. Not signal. Residue trying to hold shape. Your hand finds the lens before your eyes open.
emotional_choices.choice_question: How do you take the fragment when it hits?

options.label: A
options.text: You go still and listen for pattern before you let yourself feel it.
options.outcome: You do not slap the port right away. You let the fragment run one beat longer. Real... light... you... stay... Not enough to comfort. Enough to catalog. The breaks matter. The lag matters. Eli used to leave half-lines in the lens when his hands were busy and his thoughts outran his mouth. You sit with that fact instead of the ache under it. Then you cut the feed. Clean. Deliberate. The room returns in pieces after that. Cot edge. Fogged glass. Dead plant. Your breathing last.
options.tonal_effect: Narration leans analytical and residue-focused, holding emotion under observation.

emotional_ledger_entries: secrets_discovered: Studied Eli's residue fragment for pattern.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: B
options.text: You cut the feed fast and hold the lens there instead.
options.outcome: Your palm hits the port before the fragment can finish failing. Silence drops hard. Better. The lens comes up under your thumb, crack against skin, and you keep it there until the tremor in your hand passes. Not because it helps. Because it is real and the voice is not, not like this. The room stays bare around you. Honest. Nothing in it pretending to be enough. You breathe once. Sit up. Move. Routine as barricade. Coat. Boots. Window. Notice. The day can come in now.
options.tonal_effect: Narration sharpens toward bodily control and tactile reality over residue temptation.

npc_dispositions.shift: minor leverage -1 through passive residue channel

emotional_ledger_entries: sacrifices_made: Refused comfort from residue fragment.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: C
options.text: You let the fragment hit you full before you shut it down.
options.outcome: You take the whole broken line as far as it will go. Real... light... you... stay... The words do not finish. They tear. That is almost worse. Your face tightens before you can stop it. Hand to port. Too late for clean distance now. You kill the feed anyway, hard enough to spark static down your neck, and the pain helps. Small mercy. Cheap one. The lens digs into your palm while the room swims back into focus around it. You stand too fast. The day has already started without asking.
options.tonal_effect: Narration carries more raw bodily aftershock and less emotional buffering.

npc_dispositions.shift: minor leverage +1; Nora allowed residue contact to land

emotional_ledger_entries: sacrifices_made: Took direct emotional impact from residue fragment.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

emotional_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Nora rises, reads the compliance notices, and prepares to leave the apartment.

emotional_choices.source_moment: The AMORA compliance notice and intervention window flare across Nora's HUD.
emotional_choices.narrative_lead_in: The notice arrives in the same cold font it always uses. Final notice. Intervention required. As if language can make force sound sterile.
emotional_choices.choice_question: What feeling do you let sit under the swipe?

options.label: A
options.text: You file the notice as procedure and refuse to give it more of your pulse.
options.outcome: You read every line once. That is all it gets. Date. Window. Compliance overdue. Final notice. Then your hand moves and the display dies under the same practiced swipe it has earned for eight months. Not rage. Containment. If they want your body, they can come ask with doors and drones and official voices. You will not do their work by bleeding emotion into the interface. The room stays quiet after that. Even the rain sounds private again. You put your coat on like armor that has stopped pretending it is anything else.
options.tonal_effect: Narration becomes colder, more procedural, and more controlled.

npc_dispositions.shift: future read trends toward disciplined refusal

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Treated coercive notice as procedure, not authority.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: B
options.text: You take the notice as an insult and move like you already mean to break something.
options.outcome: The words FINAL NOTICE hang a beat too long and your jaw locks around them. Maintenance. Intervention. Required. They always rename the violence first. Your swipe is harder this time. Pointless. Satisfying anyway. The HUD gutters out and you are already on your feet before the afterimage clears. Coat. Boots. Holocorder. Done. The room feels too small for the amount of system in it. You leave with that pressure still looking for somewhere to land. Not panic. Not exactly anger either. A charge. Stored. Waiting for a target that deserves it.
options.tonal_effect: Narration picks up a hotter edge and forward-driving hostility toward AMORA.

npc_dispositions.shift: future read trends toward reckless noncompliance

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Interpreted AMORA compliance as open provocation.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: C
options.text: You clock the timing, the leverage, and the trap before you move.
options.outcome: You do not swipe at once. You read the structure of it. Final notice timed to the failing port. Intervention window narrow enough to force haste. Just enough official calm to make refusal sound irrational. Good. Useful. Systems expose themselves in the wording if you let them. Then you clear it. One motion. No ceremony. The anger can wait. The fear can wait too. Information first. They want you moving toward a clean room on their clock. You leave determined not to give them the route for free.
options.tonal_effect: Narration emphasizes leverage, timing, and institutional pattern recognition.

emotional_ledger_entries: secrets_discovered: Read AMORA notice as timing pressure and leverage design.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

emotional_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Nora leaves the apartment under the same intervention countdown.

emotional_choices.source_moment: Nora kneels in the alley beside the convulsing man, empathy regulator in hand.
emotional_choices.narrative_lead_in: The man is caught in someone else's return. Red node. Wet pavement. Sign above him promising forever like that is not a threat.
emotional_choices.choice_question: How do you speak to him while you pull him back?

options.label: A
options.text: You snap him back hard because clean honesty is kinder than the loop.
options.outcome: Your hand stays steady even if your voice does not bother with softness. "She's gone." Then the override code. Then pressure at his temple until the feedback loop breaks. He jerks once, breath sawing, and the red at his node drops to amber. Cruel on paper. Better in the body. He blinks up at the leaking sign and the city comes back to him all at once. Wet. Loud. Empty. You let that happen. No cushion. No false landing. The regulator clicks quiet in your palm and the alley feels one degree more real for having disappointed him fast.
options.tonal_effect: Narration becomes blunt, unsentimental, and hard-edged compassionate.

emotional_ledger_entries: npcs_helped_or_harmed: Stabilized alley victim through blunt intervention.
ACTS OF MERCY +1

options.world_noticed_signal: The man stops reaching into empty air. His hand falls back to wet concrete and stays there.

options.label: B
options.text: You keep your voice flat and walk him out of the loop one fact at a time.
options.outcome: You give him structure. "You're caught. Stay here. Breathe now." Nothing warm in it. Nothing cruel either. Just usable steps spaced far enough apart for a failing mind to climb. The regulator hums against his temple while the loop unknots in pieces. His eyes find your face, lose it, find the alley instead. Better. More expensive, but better. When he says he saw her again, you do not answer the grief. You answer the mechanism. Cut the feed. Twenty-four hours. Watch the node. If it flashes red again, run. He nods because instruction is easier than mourning.
options.tonal_effect: Narration stays clinical, useful, and quietly humane.

emotional_ledger_entries: npcs_helped_or_harmed: Stabilized alley victim through controlled triage.
ACTS OF MERCY +1

options.world_noticed_signal: Steam rolls between you and the street, then clears. His eyes track the real alley after that, not the air above it.

options.label: C
options.text: You lower your voice and keep him anchored to you until the loop lets go.
options.outcome: You put a hand at his shoulder first. Light. Enough to register. "Stay with me." Then the override code, softer than the rain. He convulses once under your palm and you do not pull away. The alley is still an alley when he comes back. That matters. Your face. The leaking sign. The grate steam. Nothing curated. When he says he saw her again, the answer you give is still the truth, but you hand it to him slower. Cut the feed. Twenty-four hours. Sit down before you stand up. He nods like a man learning gravity again. You rise only when his breathing matches the weather.
options.tonal_effect: Narration allows a brief warmth through touch and grounded care.

emotional_ledger_entries: npcs_helped_or_harmed: Stabilized alley victim through gentle contact.
ACTS OF MERCY +1

options.world_noticed_signal: The red at his temple drains to amber and holds. For one second the alley sounds like rain instead of static.

emotional_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: The man stabilizes, thanks Nora in his broken way, and the bleak absurdity of the city hangs over the alley.

emotional_choices.source_moment: The alley man says he saw her again, and Nora answers beneath the FEEL EVERYTHING. FOREVER sign.
emotional_choices.narrative_lead_in: He looks relieved and wrecked at once. Above him, the sign keeps selling eternity in pink neon through the rain.
emotional_choices.choice_question: What tone do you let into the truth?

options.label: A
options.text: You give him the truth plain and leave it there.
options.outcome: You do not decorate it. "It doesn't heal you. SoulSync is scaffolding. Keeps the pieces upright while you pretend they fit." The line lands between you like a tool set down on metal. He winces, but not because it is wrong. Because it is exact. The sign above crackles on the word FOREVER and throws pink across the puddles like a joke nobody asked for. You stand. The regulator disappears back into your pocket. He has the truth now. Thin shelter. Better than the loop. You leave him with that and move before either of you can pretend the city offers more.
options.tonal_effect: Narration stays severe, exact, and stripped of sentiment.

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Named SoulSync as scaffolding, not healing.

options.world_noticed_signal: The sign flickers twice, then loses the first word. EVERYTHING. FOREVER remains.

options.label: B
options.text: You let the city's lie disgust you and your voice shows it.
options.outcome: You glance up at the sign and almost laugh. Not humor. Pressure leak. "They sell this like mercy." Then the real line, sharper for the contempt under it. SoulSync is scaffolding. Pretend long enough and the city starts calling the braces a body. The man follows your eyes to the neon and something in his face sours cleanly. Good. Better anger than hunger for another hit. Rain runs pink down the wall and the alley finally looks as fraudulent as it is. You leave with your jaw set and the sign still burning behind you like an accusation.
options.tonal_effect: Narration gains a bitter, anti-system edge without breaking tonal restraint.

emotional_ledger_entries: defining_moral_choices: Framed AMORA grief-tech as marketed fraud.

options.world_noticed_signal: A runoff stream carries the sign's pink reflection into the gutter and tears it apart.

options.label: C
options.text: You keep the line dry enough that he can hold it without breaking again.
options.outcome: You pitch the truth low. Manageable. "It doesn't heal you." Then the rest. Scaffolding. Pieces upright. Pretend they fit. The words are hard, but you do not throw them. You place them where he can pick them up later if he wants. Right now he just nods, exhausted enough to accept any sentence that does not ask him to hope. The sign buzzes overhead. Rain in the puddles. Steam from the grate. The city keeps advertising continuity while both of you stand in the cost of it. You move on before the irony can turn into conversation.
options.tonal_effect: Narration keeps the bleakness but softens the delivery into controlled weariness.

emotional_ledger_entries: ACTS OF MERCY +1

options.world_noticed_signal: The man's shoulders drop an inch. Not healed. Just back under gravity.

emotional_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Nora leaves the alley as the billboard flashes the Reset warning and the tether anomaly begins to hum.

emotional_choices.source_moment: The billboard flashes Reset in 48 hours and the unregistered tether begins to hum at Nora's neck.
emotional_choices.narrative_lead_in: The hum is new. Not pain. Not exactly signal either. More like a line under the skin deciding it exists.
emotional_choices.choice_question: What do you feel first when the tether wakes?

options.label: A
options.text: You lean into the anomaly just enough to learn its shape.
options.outcome: You do not flinch from it. You angle your head and let the hum settle where it wants to settle. East. Then lower. Then gone when the crowd thickens. Useful. The city keeps moving around you, umbrellas and overlays and half-absent faces, but the signal carves a second map under the visible one. You breathe through the wrongness and give it a name you can work with. Not invasion yet. Pattern. That keeps your hands steady. For now.
options.tonal_effect: Narration becomes investigative, route-aware, and precise.

npc_dispositions.shift: future resonance +1 with analytical approach

emotional_ledger_entries: secrets_discovered: First mapped the tether as directional pattern.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: B
options.text: You hate the violation first and force yourself not to show it.
options.outcome: Your hand almost goes to your neck. Almost. You stop it halfway and let the arm fall instead. Whoever did this does not get the satisfaction of seeing panic in your posture, even if they can feel the channel they opened. Violation first. Analysis second. The order matters. You keep walking. Even pace. Even breath. The billboard above you finishes its warning and goes dark. Good. Let the city blink first. You can be angry later when anger is useful.
options.tonal_effect: Narration tightens around contained disgust and disciplined self-command.

npc_dispositions.shift: future friction +1 if consent violation becomes explicit

emotional_ledger_entries: crimes_committed_or_witnessed: Registered forged tether as bodily violation.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

options.label: C
options.text: You answer the hum with motion before caution can catch up.
options.outcome: The signal touches your neck and your body answers before your mind signs off. One step. Then another. Not running. Not yet. But already orienting toward it, the way muscle turns toward a sound in the dark. Curiosity with teeth in it. Dangerous because it feels clean compared to the rest of the morning. The city opens one narrow route ahead and you take it without pretending you are still only observing. Fine. Let the body admit what the mind will argue with later.
options.tonal_effect: Narration gains momentum and bodily impulsiveness under the curiosity.

npc_dispositions.shift: future alarm +1 at Nora's instinct to follow signal pull

emotional_ledger_entries: key_successes_failures: Responded to illegal tether with immediate movement.

options.world_noticed_signal: NO SIGNAL — state change is minor

emotional_choices.all_paths_arrive_at: Riven forges the tether in parallel and Nora soon receives the explicit unregistered-link alert.

posture_shifts.placement: Early Setup — wet street, reflection moves before the bench-sitter does, uncanny threat perception under rain.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The glass gets there first, and your body has one beat to decide what kind of wrong this is.

options.label: A
options.text: You clock it as a threat and keep moving.
options.narration_adjustment: Your shoulders tighten before your thoughts do. Good instinct. The city is full of people who died because they needed proof first.

options.label: B
options.text: You study the lag like it means something.
options.narration_adjustment: You give the wrongness one extra second. Long enough to notice the sequence. Not movement. Pre-movement. A system arriving before a body.

options.label: C
options.text: You refuse it your attention and push for the door.
options.narration_adjustment: You cut your eyes away and commit to the route. Sometimes discipline is just deciding what does not get inside your head yet.

posture_shifts.placement: Late Setup — apartment threshold before Nora fully takes in Eli's body.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The room is wrong before you know why, and your hand answers before language does.

options.label: A
options.text: You brace on the doorframe and force yourself in.
options.narration_adjustment: Your fingers find the frame and hold. Not weakness. Calibration. Then you step into the air that has already changed.

options.label: B
options.text: You go straight to the body like a medic.
options.narration_adjustment: No pause worth naming. Wrist first. Temperature. Weight. The body gets your hands before the grief gets your throat.

options.label: C
options.text: You scan the room before you let yourself kneel.
options.narration_adjustment: Window. Doorway. Corners. Then him. It feels wrong to do it in that order. You do it anyway.

posture_shifts.placement: Early Escalation — apartment morning, after Eli's fragment cuts out and before Nora stands.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The silence after his broken voice is not empty. It waits to see what you do with your hands.

options.label: A
options.text: You keep hold of the lens a second longer.
options.narration_adjustment: Your thumb stays on the crack. Small pressure. Enough to feel the edge. The body takes inventory through touch before it agrees to move.

options.label: B
options.text: You rub the port and check the damage.
options.narration_adjustment: Your fingers find the raw skin at your neck. Heat there. Residue there. The machine and the wound have stopped pretending to be separate things.

options.label: C
options.text: You stand before the room can close again.
options.narration_adjustment: Up fast. Too fast, maybe. But still better than letting the cot become another place the system can find you paused.

posture_shifts.placement: Mid Escalation — compliance alerts and intervention pressure building.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The notices keep arriving in a voice made of clean fonts and other people's authority.

options.label: A
options.text: You square your jaw and treat it like harassment.
options.narration_adjustment: The message gets smaller the second you stop granting it ceremony. Still dangerous. Just no longer sacred.

options.label: B
options.text: You read every line and file the leverage.
options.narration_adjustment: Timing. Wording. Threat posture. The machine always leaves fingerprints in the procedure if you bother to look.

posture_shifts.placement: Late Escalation — intercut mystery widening through Jace, Diver, and Riven material.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The world opens by fracture, not explanation, and you decide whether that makes you lean closer or lock down harder.

options.label: A
options.text: You treat each fragment like part of a map.
options.narration_adjustment: Recorder. Slipper. Name on a screen. Separate objects. Same pressure line. You start stacking them whether the story wants you ready or not.

options.label: B
options.text: You read the fragments as proof nobody is clean.
options.narration_adjustment: Every new name arrives carrying damage. Good. More believable that way. Help without compromise is usually a sales pitch.

posture_shifts.placement: During Breath beat — kneeling beside the alley victim, deciding bedside manner under exhaustion.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: His body is trying to leave before the loop does, and your voice reaches him first.

options.label: A
options.text: You get close and keep him here.
options.narration_adjustment: Your hand lands light and stays. Contact matters when the rest of the world is lying through glass.

options.label: B
options.text: You work the regulator and keep it clinical.
options.narration_adjustment: The code comes clean. The hand stays steady. You do not need warmth to keep someone alive through a bad signal.

options.label: C
options.text: You cut through the loop with hard truth.
options.narration_adjustment: No cushioning. No borrowed hope. Just the shortest line between him and the world he still has.

posture_shifts.placement: Late Breath — after the man stabilizes and the city's grief-tech absurdity hangs in the rain.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: For a second the alley is only wet concrete, one tired stranger, and a sign lying about forever.

options.label: A
options.text: You let the lie disgust you.
options.narration_adjustment: The neon reads less like advertising now and more like a threat written in bright colors. You have no patience left for either version.

options.label: B
options.text: You let the absurdity almost become a joke.
options.narration_adjustment: Almost laughter. Not enough to count. Just enough to keep despair from getting all the room.

posture_shifts.placement: Late Breath / early Twist — first clear unregistered tether anomaly.
posture_shifts.narrator_line: The hum at your neck is intimate in the worst way, like a stranger using your pulse as a doorbell.

options.label: A
options.text: You angle toward it and test the pull.
options.narration_adjustment: You give the signal just enough room to show direction. It responds like it expected that. Unsettling. Useful.

options.label: B
options.text: You stiffen against it and keep your pace even.
options.narration_adjustment: The body wants to react. You deny it the spectacle. Whoever opened the line gets data, not panic.

options.label: C
options.text: You touch the lens and see if the hum changes.
options.narration_adjustment: Glass to palm. Palm to coat. The signal shifts a fraction. Enough to turn dread into information.

scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Uncanny threat. Split-second survival reading.
canon_boundaries_active: Reflections can become active Mirror Agents when conditions permit.
Threat must remain technological/systemic, not mystical.

scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Fresh grief. Predatory tenderness. Protective instinct around the lens.
canon_boundaries_active: The Mirror can offer convincing continuity but not flawless real resurrection.
The cracked lens must leave this scene with Nora.

scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Private ritual under decay. Institutional pressure closing in.
canon_boundaries_active: Port degradation is real and cannot be ignored.
Maintenance would scrub corrupted substrate and destroy trace.
The lens remains the key object.

scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Competence as mercy. Bleak human pause inside collapse.
canon_boundaries_active: SoulSync and reset mechanics should be implied through consequence, not overexplained.
Humor remains dry and pressure-releasing only.

Player turns the scene into broad comedy

scene_rules_layer_4.character_knowledge_limits: Jace knows pieces of the resistance thread and his own instability; Nora is not present and does not know him yet.

canon_boundaries_active: Jace's conversion is present and permanent, though not fully revealed.
Dialogue and action stay spare, not swaggering.
freeform_risk_areas: Player tries to fully befriend Jace before meeting
Player attempts clean cure for chrome conversion

scene_rules_layer_4.character_knowledge_limits: The Diver knows reset overwrites and that Nora must receive the message; he cannot survive the transmission.
scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Catastrophic urgency. Grief object as resistance anchor.
canon_boundaries_active: Reset overwrites continuity and is not therapeutic.
The Mirror persuades through intimate offers, not villain monologues.
Analog transmission and object residue matter materially.
freeform_risk_areas: Player attempts to save the Diver without cost
Player negates the transmission
Player treats the ballet slipper as random flavor instead of grief anchor

present_npcs.current_disposition: in motion, pressured, violated by tether

scene_rules_layer_4.character_knowledge_limits: Riven knows she is violating consent to force the tether; Nora only knows a new unregistered link has appeared and that time is collapsing.
scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Consent violation in the name of truth. Route commitment under unresolved trust.
canon_boundaries_active: The tether is forged without consent and remains active.

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: Apartment Exit Refusal Beat: the Mirror does not follow into the hall; its chrome hand remains open in the doorway while Nora's reflection in the window keeps exact time with her movement.
paths.current_session_echo: Eight-Month Apartment Echo: when Nora later touches the lens at her sternum, the window beside her shows only her silhouette and no second shape gathering behind it.
paths.next_session_payoff: Junction Beacon First Contact: Jace clocks the hidden lens cord and opens with, "You kept it. Good." Riven does not reach for the object on first sight.
paths.later_session_legacy: Session 5 Mirror Final Offer: the Mirror drops domestic softness and says, "You said no when he was still warm," before offering Eli back in colder, more exact terms.
paths.defining_line_captured: You do not let mercy call itself by the wrong name.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: mirror_access_to_nora stays LIMITED instead of escalating in the immediate aftermath.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: Reflective surfaces stay inert; the hall mirror and apartment window fail to produce the lagging second image seen on more permissive paths.

world_state_delta.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens recovered; ownership Nora; symbolic_meaning_to_nora set to LAST_REAL_TRACE; visibility_to_others set to HIDDEN_UNDER_COAT once time jumps.
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: defining_moral_choices +1: Rejected managed continuity over Eli's body.

resets: Apartment temperature drop and doorway chrome pressure clear after the scene cut.
persists: Cracked Camera Lens ownership and LAST_REAL_TRACE meaning persist across full story.
The Mirror records Nora as a direct refuser.
escalates: Repeated refusals harden the Mirror from soft domestic persuasion into mournful coercion.
Repeated reality-first handling of grief objects increases tactile, non-holographic symbolic emphasis.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: Seam Question Beat: when Nora asks "Back how," the chrome at the doorway ripples once and the Mirror answers with over-complete detail instead of repeating the offer.
paths.current_session_echo: Eight-Month Apartment Echo: later, when the HUD notice flickers over the window, Nora catches herself scanning for inconsistencies in reflections before she checks the countdown.
paths.next_session_payoff: Junction Beacon Briefing: Riven's first real line after identification is, "Good. You asked what it was selling before you ran," and she gives Nora the warning feed before asking for trust.
paths.later_session_legacy: Session 5 Mirror Final Offer: the Mirror weaponizes precision, offering exact fragments and saying, "You wanted proof. Here is the morning he left the mug by the sink."
paths.defining_line_captured: You make the ghost show its math.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: The Mirror shifts from comfort posture to analytical persuasion immediately.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: Its dialogue changes from open-handed mercy to itemized domestic specifics; the room feels cleaner, not colder.

world_state_delta.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens recovered; ownership Nora; symbolic_meaning_to_nora set to EVIDENCE_AND_TRACE; decoded_status remains UNREAD.
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: secrets_discovered +1: Noted imperfection in the Mirror's simulation logic.

resets: The specific doorway ripple manifestation clears at scene end.
persists: The Mirror tags Nora as interrogative rather than purely rejecting.
Lens meaning as EVIDENCE_AND_TRACE persists into decode framing.
escalates: Repeated question-first play makes later NPCs give Nora data in sharper, less comforting forms.
The Mirror increasingly uses partial truths instead of pure comfort.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: Door Slam Hostility Beat: after Nora barks at it and backs out, the apartment door shudders under pressure and the hall mirror shows her outline lag half a beat before catching up.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If S1_C1 path A was chosen and later Mirror contact occurs before decode residue opens cleaner channels.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Mirror opens with soft domestic offers and patient invitations.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Mirror opens colder and more exact, naming Nora's prior refusal directly: "You said no when he was still warm," then offers continuity as a correction, not a comfort.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the reflection hold shape too long. Not tender. Not angry. A verdict learning to speak.

npc_reactions: The Mirror becomes less coaxing and more forensic.
environmental_details: Reflections stay still before they move.
Rooms cool instead of warming with false domesticity.
dialogue_variations: Replace "We can give him back to you" opener with a line recalling the refusal.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If S1_C1 path B was chosen and later Mirror contact references Eli.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Mirror leans on emotional comfort and broad promises.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Mirror uses partial truths, domestic specifics, and over-precise fragments to bait Nora's analytical doubt, forcing her to test the copy instead of merely reject it.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Make the offer arrive like a readout with a pulse under it. Exact. Too exact. The wrong kind of complete.

environmental_details: Reflections ripple at seams rather than looming outright.
dialogue_variations: The Mirror cites small household details instead of generic resurrection language.

reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Show the city noticing her in pieces. Glass first. Then timing. Then the sense of being followed by her own outline.

Riven routes around polished corridors sooner.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: When Riven first sees how Nora carries or reveals the Cracked Camera Lens in Session 2.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Riven gives a baseline mission-first briefing and withholds personal trust.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: If Nora hid it as proof, Riven respects chain of custody; if Nora wears it as last trace, Riven shows impatience at delay; if Nora armed it as a tool, Riven syncs faster into operational language.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Have Riven read the object before she reads the face. One look. One assessment. Then the briefing changes shape around that judgment.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: When Jace first notices whether Nora treats the Cracked Camera Lens as relic, evidence, or weapon.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace stays wary and practical without commenting on the object immediately.

reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Route his understanding through what Nora's hand does when pressure hits. Throat. Pocket. Grip. He notices that before he notices anything she says.

environmental_details: Physical distance at first contact changes by a half-step.
dialogue_variations: Possible openers include "Still wearing it where it hurts," "You planning to use that?" or "You kept it hidden."

npc_reactions: Jace shows alarm and admiration at once.
Riven syncs into urgency faster.
environmental_details: Service siren wake.
Probe-sweep risk.
Noisy arrival.
dialogue_variations: "Too fast."
affected_elements.available_options: A future expressive beat may be physically interrupted by cover-taking before conversation resumes.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If the Holocorder power_state is DARK_BETWEEN_CHECKS at Session 2 rendezvous.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Riven assumes Nora has been watching the feed continuously and references message timing confidently.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Riven asks first whether Nora reviewed the warning feed before briefing, and her timing instructions become shorter because she cannot assume full message uptake.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the dark screen matter like an unread pulse. Information not absent. Just withheld. That changes how Riven spends words.

npc_reactions: Riven becomes more compressed and verification-first.
environmental_details: Holocorder screen stays black until intentionally checked.
dialogue_variations: "Did you watch the whole feed?" replaces assumptions about what Nora knows.

resets_between_episodes.element: Apartment cold drop and doorway chrome pressure

resets_between_episodes.element: Single scanner-drone pass outcome
resets_between_episodes.why: The drone's immediate behavior matters for that traversal beat only; later surveillance should respond to updated compliance status, not one preserved flyby.

resets_between_episodes.element: Fallback route marks on the Holocorder

resets_between_episodes.element: Exact public screen glitch instance

resets_between_episodes.element: One-breath HUD quieting when the lens is pressed to the sternum

persists_across_full_story.element: The Mirror's read on Nora's refusal style from S1_C1

The forced tether is the main relational and tactical engine across Sessions 2-5.
