scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Bleak humor. Exhaustion. A brief human pocket under countdown pressure.
canon_boundaries_active: Humor must remain dry and brief.
No therapeutic grief speeches.
The trace remains present and cannot be forgotten for convenience.
freeform_risk_areas: Player trying to fully confess everything here and resolve tension early
Player initiating overt romantic dialogue outside tone
Player demanding extensive backstory from Jace

present_npcs.current_disposition: operational, calculating, ready to pivot to next step
latent, patient, active through residual trace

scene_rules_layer_4.character_knowledge_limits: Riven only knows what Nora reports plus visible readouts; Jace suspects concealment through behavior; the exact future effect of the trace remains uncertain to everyone.
scene_rules_layer_4.emotional_context: Aftershock and decision pressure. Mission success poisoned by what it cost and what remains inside Nora.
canon_boundaries_active: Repair can restore function only by destroying stored corruption-trace.
Session cannot resolve contamination fully here.
Mission progress must carry into next session.
freeform_risk_areas: Player attempting immediate full repair without loss
Player trying to destroy the root node in this session
Player revealing or concealing with zero social consequence

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: Riven reads the anomaly flat off the console: "Degradation below expected. Channel separation too stable. Source variance unconfirmed." Then she slides a narrow-band filter over the live feed, and the oscilloscope drops from a smooth line into a stuttering comb.
paths.current_session_echo: Blackout reveal scene: when the helping source pushes through, Riven says "There. It adjusted to the filter" instead of "It got in," and Jace keeps his eyes on the monitor rather than on Nora's face.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 61 port-contact scene: Ilya opens with, "You tested the voice before you trusted it. Good," framing Nora as someone who still distinguishes signal from seduction.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 82 Mirror offer scene: the Mirror abandons domestic softness faster and pivots to exact procedural truth, offering route efficiency instead of Eli-first comfort.
paths.defining_line_captured: You do not trust relief that arrives too fast.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: decode_gate_narrowed and the room shifts into evidence posture
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: Riven changes the board settings in front of Nora, reads the anomaly aloud, and the stream visibly roughens on the monitor while Jace stops watching Nora and starts watching the machine.

npc_shifts.direction: less immediate leverage through comfort framing

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: defining_moral_choices +1: Tested the wrong-clean stream before yielding.

resets: Riven's narrow-band filter setting clears when the decode chamber is abandoned at episode boundary.
persists: Nora is remembered as someone who demanded the anomaly be named before proceeding.
decode_gate_narrowed history remains referenceable in later briefings and Mirror contact tone.
escalates: Repeated evidence-first choices make the Mirror less soothing and more exact in later persuasion scenes.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: Riven spikes the gain on Nora's word. The oscilloscope stops shuddering and holds one clean tone. Blood slips from Nora's nose onto the grounding strap before Jace gets off the wall.
paths.current_session_echo: Blackout reveal scene: the helping source arrives as relief first. Nora's port heat settles for one wrong second before the vision-cortex spike hits, and Jace says "Too easy" under his breath.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 56 diver assignment briefing: Riven does not hedge. "You held open a dirty channel and stayed functional. You're the diver."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 79 breach hold: narration leans into burn-rate precedent; Riven's order lands like confirmation, not request, and Jace's protest is sharper because Nora has already spent body first before.
paths.defining_line_captured: You spend body first and ask what it cost after.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: port_stress_spike and mirror access widens toward CHANNEL_OPEN
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The monitor line smooths unnaturally, Nora bleeds immediately, and Jace physically steps in with alarm while the room smells metallic.

npc_shifts.direction: more regard for Nora's burn-rate resolve

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: sacrifices_made +1: Spent more port integrity to force progress.

resets: The immediate nosebleed and acute flare pass after recovery.
persists: Riven logs Nora as willing to cross warning thresholds for progress.
Mirror access trend toward CHANNEL_OPEN remains in Nora's Neural Port state.
escalates: Repeated body-first choices harden Jace into field-report cold warnings and make Riven assign Nora to higher-cost roles.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: A limiter tone joins the chamber hum. Riven locks a hard cap across the readout, and the stream starts grinding in visible bursts instead of pouring clean.
paths.current_session_echo: Blackout reveal scene: when the source helps, it has to push against the limiter. The monitor flashes clipped access bursts, and Riven says "It's forcing the gate" while Jace exhales once through his nose.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 61 port-contact scene: if Ilya reaches Nora, the contact comes through static-edged fragments first because the prior hardening left less clean access; Ilya's first line becomes, "You made even this difficult."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 82 Mirror offer scene: the Mirror speaks with faint drag and impatience, emphasizing cost and lost time because Nora has made access come through constraints before.
paths.defining_line_captured: You make danger come through a door, not a flood.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: decode_safeguards_hardened and the anomaly is forced to manifest against visible constraints
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: A new limiter tone sounds, the readout gains a hard cap line, and the stream visibly stalls and surges instead of flowing cleanly.

npc_shifts.direction: more respect for discipline with some friction at constraint

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: promises_made +1: Set conditions on further bodily risk.

resets: The physical limiter hardware setting resets when the rig powers down between episodes.
persists: Nora's pattern of imposing procedure under threat remains in archive and NPC memory.
decode_safeguards_hardened history shapes future contact texture.
escalates: Repeated containment choices make later system intrusions rougher, noisier, and more openly adversarial.

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: Riven reaches for the Cracked Camera Lens, stops, and looks to Nora first. She lays it on a clean cloth beside the plate instead of remounting it hot. Jace clocks the change and says nothing.
paths.current_session_echo: Mirror offer scene: the perfect chrome lens inside the stream loses authority because the real cracked one is now treated like evidence. Nora's narration lingers on the cord rough against her fingers before the offer speaks.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 68 route briefing: Riven handles the lens with gloved precision and says, "We use it once. No improvisation," openly deferring to the evidence protocol Nora established.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 80 pendant catch: if Nora threads pendant to lens later, the gesture reads as burdened custody rather than fusion-weapon triumph; Jace notices the care and does not object.
paths.defining_line_captured: You keep the proof scarred enough to stay true.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: lens_handling_restricted and the Cracked Camera Lens becomes protected evidence in-scene
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: Riven visibly waits for Nora before touching the lens, uses a cloth, and the cradle starts being treated like an evidence tray rather than a hot mount.

npc_shifts.direction: more operational respect with frustration at delay
more trust that Nora preserves the real over comfort
less emotional leverage through the lens object

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: key_successes_failures +1: Preserved the cracked lens as proof.

resets: The clean cloth and temporary evidence layout clear when the team leaves the chamber.
persists: Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora remains evidence_protected_under_her_terms.
Riven remembers Nora as someone who set handling conditions on mission-critical proof.
escalates: Repeated protection of grief objects unlocks more careful NPC handling and more tactile-reality emphasis in late scenes.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: Riven splits the monitor into two labeled columns: MAP STRUCTURE / RESIDUE PATTERN. The perfect lens in the stream flickers thinner the moment it is classified.
paths.current_session_echo: Mirror offer scene: the offer comes with live labels still crawling on the side monitor, so Eli-warmth is visually bracketed as residue while the route data continues to resolve.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 61 Ilya contact: if Ilya references Nora's port, she says, "You separated pattern from person. Most don't," acknowledging Nora's analytic distinction and pressing on it.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 78 Amara reveal: Nora gets one extra line of interpretive clarity in narration, recognizing preserved personhood and system use as separate layers instead of collapsing them into one accusation.
paths.defining_line_captured: You make grief submit to readout.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: split_channel_analysis_active and the anomaly is visibly classified into separate channels
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: New monitor labels appear immediately, Riven's voice gets cleaner once the problem is named, and the perfect lens image loses some of its solidity.

npc_shifts.direction: more trust in Nora's evidence-minded method

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: secrets_discovered +1: Distinguished map signal from Eli-residue pattern.

resets: The split-screen monitor layout clears after the chamber powers down.
persists: Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora remains analytical_key.
The archive records Nora's distinction between residue pattern and usable map data.
escalates: Repeated analytic handling makes later supernatural offers arrive with less softness and more exact contradiction.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: Riven hot-remounts the Cracked Camera Lens and drives the fracture aperture. The lens starts to hum in the cradle. Jace says Nora's name once as the glass trembles.
paths.current_session_echo: Mirror offer scene: the perfect lens inside the stream brightens in direct sympathy with the stressed real one, making the offer feel like a bargain already underway rather than a fresh temptation.
paths.next_session_payoff: Event 68 route briefing: Jace looks at the lens before he looks at Nora and says, "One more bad pass and that thing goes," while Riven answers, "Then we do not miss."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 79 analog breach: the lens throws harsher, blade-like light at the root, and if used there, narration frames it as something already taught to cut by Nora's earlier permission.
paths.defining_line_captured: You turn memory into equipment and do not apologize.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: lens_stress_elevated and the Cracked Camera Lens becomes a visibly endangered tool
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The lens audibly hums, visibly shakes in its mount, and Jace reacts at once to Nora's willingness to spend the relic.

world_state_delta.inventory: Cracked Camera Lens functional_state -> stressed; symbolic_meaning_to_nora -> weaponized_tool

npc_shifts.direction: more regard for Nora as mission-first under pressure
more hurt at Nora's willingness to spend the relic
more leverage through shared use of Eli-residue

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: sacrifices_made +1: Risked Eli's last real trace for decode speed.

resets: The active cradle hum ends when the rig powers down.
persists: Cracked Camera Lens functional_state remains stressed.
Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora remains weaponized_tool unless later recontextualized.
escalates: Repeated weaponization of grief objects makes Jace less forgiving and the Mirror more confident that Nora will spend memory for access.

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: The moment Nora opens the channel, the pain drops out. Signal settles. The oscilloscope becomes one clean line, and Riven goes pale because the integrity graph stabilizes when it should be tearing.
paths.current_session_echo: Post-decode chamber aftermath: the room is quiet too fast. Nora can stand sooner than she should, but the port stays warm after the rig powers down. Jace notices the wrong ease before anyone says contamination.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 opening corridor check: Jace stops Nora with "Still warm?" before the team moves. Later, Ilya's contact arrives cleaner and earlier, opening with, "You let the system meet you halfway."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 71 corridor confrontation: Ilya speaks to Nora as someone already capable of consent-shaped compromise, offering access instead of warning; Event 82 Mirror offer arrives with domestic certainty and almost no static.
paths.defining_line_captured: You let the wrong thing carry you because the truth still matters.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: mirror_access_to_nora -> CHANNEL_OPEN and full kill map arrives through wrong ease
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: Pain vanishes unnaturally, the graph stabilizes instead of degrading, coordinates flood in whole, and the port remains warm after the pass ends.

npc_shifts.direction: more concern at contamination with grudging awe at results
more fear that Nora is drifting into the system
major increase in access through consent-shaped opening

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: defining_moral_choices +1: Accepted contaminated help to complete the map.

resets: The immediate decode pain relief ends with the scene.
persists: mirror_access_to_nora remains CHANNEL_OPEN into the next episode unless later altered by repair or root destruction.
lens_decode_progress remains FULL_KILL_MAP.
escalates: Repeated acceptance of low-cost system help makes Ilya warmer, the Mirror more intimate, and Jace more physically watchful.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: Nora says no. The stream shears into static. Blood returns at her nose, and Jace is at the chair before the map is half assembled. Riven has to ride the degradation line manually.
paths.current_session_echo: Post-decode chamber aftermath: Nora gets the map in torn pieces and can barely unclench her left hand. The port cools instead of glowing, but not fully. Riven checks pupil response before she checks route completeness.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 opening: Nora wakes with hand numbness and a dead-cold patch around the port scar. Ilya's first contact, if it comes, is delayed and rough with static. She opens: "You chose pain to keep the line yours."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 71 corridor confrontation: Ilya stops offering easy continuity and argues irreversible cost instead. Event 82 Mirror offer arrives faintly mournful, then coercive, because repeated refusal has denied it clean entry.
paths.defining_line_captured: You would rather break honestly than be carried clean.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: mirror access is reduced to TRACE_IN_PORT while port_integrity_critical_strain becomes visible
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The rig sounds overworked, Nora bleeds and loses hand sensation, Jace closes distance immediately, and the channel cools instead of settling.

npc_shifts.direction: more respect for refusal under pain

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: sacrifices_made +1: Spent body to keep the line real.

resets: The active nosebleed stops during recovery.
persists: port_integrity_critical_strain remains in Nora's Neural Port condition.
mirror_access_to_nora remains TRACE_IN_PORT.
escalates: Repeated refusal under pain makes Ilya more formal, the Mirror more mournful-coercive, and Jace more openly protective.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: Riven adjusts for pulse access. The rig slips between clean bursts and drag, as if two operators are taking turns. The map builds in staggered blocks while the port warmth comes and goes in measured hits.
paths.current_session_echo: Post-decode chamber aftermath: Nora is functional but not clean. The monitor still shows intermittent trace activity after shutdown, and Jace watches the pauses between her breaths more than the blood.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 opening prep scene: Riven asks, "Can you pulse it again or not?" instead of assuming repair or concealment. Ilya's later contact opens with, "You kept terms. For now."
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 71 corridor confrontation: Ilya treats Nora as negotiable, not compliant. Event 82 Mirror offer uses boundary language—"Only the data. Only this once"—because Nora taught it the shape of her compromise.
paths.defining_line_captured: You bargain with the wound and call it discipline.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: managed_partial_channel_active and the contamination remains active but visibly controlled
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The monitor alternates between ease and resistance, Riven visibly times the pulses, and trace activity remains on-screen after the decode ends.

npc_shifts.direction: more trust in Nora's tactical compromise
more uneasy respect mixed with worry
more sustained foothold through conditional access

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: End beat in the chamber: Riven stops studying the completed route and starts studying the skin at Nora's neck. Her next words are thresholds and surgical windows, not congratulations. Jace stays close without touching.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 surgical prep: Riven opens over white light with, "If we clean the port, the route stays. The residue does not." Jace is already in the room. He has not left.
paths.next_session_opening: Clinical dread. White light on surgical steel. Riven first, gloved and flat-voiced. Immediate stakes: clean port versus dead channels, and whether Nora can lose the residue and still move on the Core.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 61 Ilya contact shifts toward clean-port reach if repair proceeds; Event 82 Mirror leverage is reduced, forcing it to work through absence and remembered cost rather than live warmth.
paths.defining_line_captured: You choose the cut that keeps you moving.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: repair_path_committed and the next-session frame locks onto surgery planning
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The session ends on Riven's immediate pivot into repair thresholds, Jace's stillness, and the explicit next-session opening image of surgical prep.

npc_shifts.direction: less security because repair threatens access

environmental_flags: ilya_operational_posture may shift through port condition
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: promises_made +1: Committed to repair despite continuity loss.

resets: The decode chamber recovery posture ends at the episode boundary.
persists: repair_path_committed remains active until the repair scene resolves.
The archive records that Nora disclosed contamination instead of hiding it.
escalates: Repeated honesty under personal cost makes Jace stay closer sooner and makes Riven offer more operational truth.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: End beat in the chamber: Riven turns back to the route because Nora gives her no new threat to solve. Jace does not. His eyes stay on Nora a second too long. The trace answers with one private pulse under the scar.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 corridor move-out: the team advances on the map under incomplete information. Jace opens with, "You look wrong," while Nora still has the hidden warmth. Later, if Ilya contacts Nora, she reaches the live residue faster than anyone expected.
paths.next_session_opening: Low operational dread. Corridor light. Jace first, watching too closely. Immediate stakes: the team is already moving on a compromised plan while the hidden trace warms under Nora's skin like a second route.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 71 corridor confrontation can expose the concealment and fracture Riven's trust; Event 82 Mirror offer arrives bolder because secrecy kept the live channel fed.
paths.defining_line_captured: You keep the ghost because it is still useful.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: contamination_secret_active and team planning proceeds on incomplete information
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The session ends with Jace's suspicious look and the private port pulse; the next session opens with the team already acting on false assumptions.

npc_shifts.direction: less secure trust because concealment can later fracture it
more unease at what Nora is withholding
more leverage through secrecy and continued access

environmental_flags: mirror_access_to_nora remains TRACE_IN_PORT or CHANNEL_OPEN depending prior choice
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: promises_kept_or_broken +1: Withheld critical truth from allies.

resets: The chamber silence itself ends at episode boundary.
persists: contamination_secret_active remains until exposed or confessed.
team_planning_based_on_incomplete_information remains active into the next mission scene.
escalates: Repeated concealment makes Jace less patient, Riven harsher when truth breaks, and the Mirror more confident in private contact.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: End beat in the chamber: Riven accepts the operational phrasing and goes back to the route. Jace hears the omission and files it. The trace feels less warm now than pressurized, like something held behind glass.
paths.next_session_payoff: Session 4 prep room: surgical tools wait unused while Riven asks for a timeline on one more pass. Jace opens with, "One more becomes one more again," making the contested extra-use plan explicit before movement begins.
paths.next_session_opening: Tense controlled ambiguity. Prep tables. Surgical tools untouched. Riven first at the route board, Jace second with a smaller, sharper line. Immediate stakes: whether Nora is managing the trace for one last use or giving it one more lesson in how to stay.
paths.later_session_legacy: Event 61 Ilya contact can arrive through the still-open management window; Event 71 confrontation gains a tactical-justification argument instead of a pure betrayal argument; Event 82 Mirror offer borrows Nora's own language of limits.
paths.defining_line_captured: You keep the wound open because it still has work to do.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: pre_repair_extra_use_planned and contamination_not_fully_disclosed shape the next-session objective
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The session ends on Nora's operational reframing, and the next session opens with unused surgical tools beside an active plan for one more controlled use.

npc_shifts.direction: more acceptance of tactical delay with alertness
more suspicion sharpened by evasive timing
more retained foothold through continued managed use

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: promises_made +1: Committed to one more controlled use before repair.

resets: The immediate recovery posture in the decode chair ends between episodes.
persists: pre_repair_extra_use_planned remains active until the extra-use scene resolves.
contamination_not_fully_disclosed remains active until Nora fully tells Riven.
escalates: Repeated tactical delay choices make Jace more openly skeptical of Nora's timing logic and teach the Mirror to present itself as manageable leverage.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora has chosen evidence-testing or channel-classifying responses at least twice by this point, including S3_C1A or S3_C2B.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Mirror approaches through Eli-shaped warmth and low-cost comfort language.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Mirror drops most comfort framing and says exact, cutting lines about what the map is, what the residue is, and what Nora is already using.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the offer arrive clean. Not softer. Sharper. The wrong voice learning that tenderness is not the door.

npc_reactions: The Mirror becomes less domestic and more analytic.
Riven notices the shift and treats the contact as contamination, not temptation.
environmental_details: Monitor labels and readouts stay in focus longer than facial memory details.
The perfect lens image flickers thinner, more specimen than apparition.
dialogue_variations: Mirror line shifts toward: "You know what I am. Use me anyway."
Riven line shifts toward: "It adapted to your framing."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora has protected or proceduralized the lens or decode, including S3_C1A, S3_C1C, or S3_C2A.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Riven handles the lens and rig at mission speed with minimal consultation.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Riven visibly asks with her eyes before touching the Cracked Camera Lens, uses cleaner handling language, and offers one extra operational detail without being forced.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Show it in the hands first. The pause before contact. Procedure turning into respect by increments.

npc_reactions: Riven becomes more consultative without becoming warm.
Jace reads the shift and relaxes by a fraction.
environmental_details: The lens is set on cloth or aligned carefully rather than slapped back into the cradle.
The console space reads as workbench, not triage chaos.
dialogue_variations: Riven adds lines like: "Under your terms." or "One pass. Clean."
affected_elements.available_options: Future tactical choices may include one extra Riven-briefing clarification line before commitment.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora has chosen body-spending or pain-refusal extremes, including S3_C1B or S3_C3B.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace warns briefly, then gives Nora room.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Jace closes distance faster, speaks in blunt field-report terms, and checks Nora's breathing, hand function, or port heat before discussing mission progress.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Keep him spare. No speech. Just the body count version of care.

npc_reactions: Jace becomes more physically protective.
Riven tolerates Jace's interruption because the risk is visible.
environmental_details: Attention shifts from monitor light to blood, tremor, numb fingers, strap marks.
The room sounds louder because the rig is overworking.
dialogue_variations: Jace lines shift toward: "Left hand." "Still breathing." "Too much."
affected_elements.available_options: A later recovery beat may offer a more explicit accept-or-deflect Jace care response.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora has widened access through S3_C1B, S3_C2C, or S3_C3A.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Mirror contact arrives with drag, static, or visible resistance.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Mirror contact arrives almost frictionless: warmth settles, reflections hold too still, and its voice enters without static.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Make the ease the threat. Relief first. Recognition after.

npc_reactions: The Mirror grows more confident and intimate.
Jace reacts to the wrong ease before he can name the source.
environmental_details: Oscilloscope line smooths unnaturally.
Reflective surfaces stop jittering and begin to wait.
dialogue_variations: Mirror line shifts toward: "No pain. No drag. Let me."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora hardened safeguards or refused clean contamination access, including S3_C1C or S3_C3B.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Ilya's later port contact comes through at ordinary system clarity.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Ilya's contact arrives broken by static and delay, forcing her to speak in shorter, more formal bursts before the line stabilizes.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the voice scrape its way in. Not absent. Resisted.

npc_reactions: Ilya sounds more formal and faintly irritated.
Nora reads the contact as intrusion, not invitation.
environmental_details: Port scar flares in clipped pulses instead of steady warmth.
HUD text stutters before resolving.
dialogue_variations: Ilya opens with: "You made even this difficult." or "You chose pain to keep the line yours."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If decode safeguards were hardened at S3_C1C.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The helping source enters as a smooth contamination event.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The source has to punch through visible limiter bursts, making its access look invasive rather than merciful.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Show the gate resisting. Then losing by inches.

npc_reactions: Riven names the intrusion as force.
Jace recognizes the struggle as more honest than the easy version.
environmental_details: Limiter tone persists under the chamber hum.
Readout spikes hit the cap line and splinter.
dialogue_variations: Riven says: "It's forcing the gate."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If the Cracked Camera Lens symbolic_meaning_to_nora is evidence_protected_under_her_terms or weaponized_tool.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace treats the lens as mission hardware with grief around it.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: If evidence_protected_under_her_terms, Jace handles it with visible care and stops objecting to its presence; if weaponized_tool, he watches every remount and speaks when it is stressed.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Route Jace through the object. What he says to the glass is what he cannot say to Nora cleanly.

npc_reactions: Jace becomes gentler around protected lens states.
Jace becomes sharper around weaponized lens states.
environmental_details: His hand either hovers without touching or closes hard at the remount.
The cord, crack, and cradle gain more descriptive weight.
dialogue_variations: Protected state: "Careful." Weaponized state: "One more bad pass and that thing goes."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If split_channel_analysis_active is present from S3_C2B.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Ilya speaks to Nora as damaged but emotionally vulnerable.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Ilya speaks to Nora as analytically dangerous, acknowledging her ability to separate pattern from person before trying to reframe continuity.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Give Ilya a cleaner blade. Admiration first. Then the turn.

npc_reactions: Ilya becomes more precise and less maternal in her opening.
Nora is treated as interpreter, not just patient.
environmental_details: System text and labels stay foregrounded during contact.
The port call feels like a diagnostic intrusion.
dialogue_variations: Ilya opens with: "You separated pattern from person. Most don't."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If mirror_access_to_nora is CHANNEL_OPEN from S3_C3A or if repair_path_committed later creates a monitored clean-port threshold.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Ilya's next-session reach is delayed, partial, or contested.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Ilya reaches earlier in the scene and with unnerving clarity, sounding almost physically present in Nora's ear.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: No static. Just the intimacy of a door that should have stayed shut.

npc_reactions: Ilya sounds warmer because access is easier.
Jace reacts faster because the contact feels too close.
environmental_details: Port warmth arrives as a smooth line rather than a flare.
Ambient room noise seems to drop under the contact.
dialogue_variations: Ilya opens with: "You let the system meet you halfway." or, post-repair path, immediately pivots to what will be lost.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Nora has either CHANNEL_OPEN or managed_partial_channel_active by the end of S3_C3.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace watches Nora closely but waits for a clear symptom before intervening.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Jace begins checking port heat, eye focus, and response lag proactively, interrupting movement beats with small bodily questions.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let his care arrive as inventory. Heat. Pupil. Delay. Still here or not.

npc_reactions: Jace becomes preemptively watchful.
Riven tolerates the checks because contamination is now active fact.
environmental_details: Movement scenes gain brief pauses at doorways or prep tables.
Attention keeps returning to the scar under Nora's collar.
dialogue_variations: Jace lines shift toward: "Still warm?" "Look at me." "Answer clean."
affected_elements.available_options: A later scene may include a choice to answer Jace plainly, deflect, or weaponize the concern.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If managed_partial_channel_active or pre_repair_extra_use_planned is active.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Ilya frames contact as authority and inevitability.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Ilya frames contact as negotiated continuity, mirroring Nora's own language of limits and temporary terms.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Make the voice sound like it listened. That is the contamination.

npc_reactions: Ilya becomes more rhetorically adaptive.
The Mirror later borrows the same boundary language.
environmental_details: Contact comes in pulses, not a continuous stream.
Readout activity rises and falls like measured permission.
dialogue_variations: Ilya opens with: "You kept terms. For now."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If repair_path_committed is active from S3_C4A.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace stays nearby but gives Nora physical space after hard decisions.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Jace remains present through prep without being asked, does not leave the room, and shifts from suspicion to quiet witness.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: No reach. No speechifying. Just the fact of him not going anywhere.

npc_reactions: Jace becomes steadier and less accusatory.
Riven reads the shared silence and does not break it unless necessary.
environmental_details: A second chair stays occupied.
His jacket or recorder remains in frame through prep.
dialogue_variations: Jace line shifts toward: "Still here."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If contamination_secret_active is active from S3_C4B.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The port trace remains a private bodily sensation with no scene punctuation.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The hidden trace answers moments of concealment with one low pulse or brief warmth spike, giving the lie a physical echo.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Use the body as the tell. The scar speaking when Nora does not.

npc_reactions: The Mirror gains confidence in private contact.
Jace senses wrongness without proof.
environmental_details: Warmth under the scar arrives in single beats.
Nearby reflective surfaces seem to hold still a fraction too long.
dialogue_variations: No one names it yet; the effect stays bodily and private until exposure.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If contamination_secret_active or contamination_not_fully_disclosed is active.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace asks direct risk questions only when symptoms are obvious.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Jace starts with smaller, sharper observations and holds eye contact longer, signaling he knows a sentence is missing even if he cannot prove which one.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Keep it in the pause. The extra second before he looks away.

npc_reactions: Jace grows less easy around Nora's answers.
Riven remains unaware unless the suspicion breaks into speech.
environmental_details: Quiet beats stretch around corridor light, prep tables, or route boards.
Jace's attention stays on Nora instead of the map.
dialogue_variations: Jace lines shift toward: "You look wrong." "That's not all."
affected_elements.available_options: A later confrontation choice may unlock earlier because Jace is already suspicious.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If pre_repair_extra_use_planned is active from S3_C4C.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Jace accepts one-more-pass logic as ugly necessity.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Jace explicitly challenges the repetition pattern, calling out that one more pass has become Nora's way of delaying the cut.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the line land dry. Not loud. A verdict, not a plea.

npc_reactions: Jace becomes more verbally skeptical.
Riven is forced to address timing instead of just route geometry.
environmental_details: Unused surgical tools remain in sight during the argument.
The route board and the prep table share the same frame of attention.
dialogue_variations: Jace says: "One more becomes one more again."
affected_elements.available_options: Future choice framing may include a direct answer to Jace's timing accusation.

resets_between_episodes.element: Temporary decode rig settings such as narrow-band filters, split-screen monitor layouts, and limiter hardware tones
resets_between_episodes.why: These belong to the chamber configuration of Session 3 and do not physically travel with Nora once the team leaves the rig.

resets_between_episodes.element: Immediate bodily flare markers such as active nosebleed, acute chair restraint pressure, and live oscilloscope tone
resets_between_episodes.why: They are scene-bound symptoms of the pass itself; the lasting condition persists, but the exact presentation clears in recovery.

resets_between_episodes.element: Evidence-table staging around the Cracked Camera Lens
resets_between_episodes.why: The cloth placement, tray posture, and chamber handling arrangement are local to the decode station rather than permanent object state.

persists_across_full_story.element: mirror_access_to_nora state changes including TRACE_IN_PORT and CHANNEL_OPEN
persists_across_full_story.why: This determines how the Mirror and Ilya can reach Nora, and it materially alters threat form, seduction texture, and later scene architecture.
Mission truth gained here is structural and must remain available for the strike, the Core route, and later confrontations.

persists_across_full_story.element: Cracked Camera Lens tracked attributes: functional_state and symbolic_meaning_to_nora
persists_across_full_story.why: How Nora has treated the lens changes Jace's reactions, Riven's trust posture, root-node use, and the object's final symbolic payoff.

persists_across_full_story.element: Nora's Neural Port condition, cleanliness, mirror_trace_presence, and sensory_side_effects
persists_across_full_story.why: The port is the body-tech site where this session's cost lives; later contact, repair, and vulnerability all depend on it.

persists_across_full_story.element: Archive entries in defining_moral_choices, sacrifices_made, promises_made, promises_kept_or_broken, secrets_discovered, and key_successes_failures
persists_across_full_story.why: These become the memory spine for later NPC judgment, persuasion framing, and ending narration.

persists_across_full_story.element: Relationship shifts for Riven, Jace, and The Mirror
persists_across_full_story.why: Session 3 is where operational trust turns into settled judgment; later scenes cash that out through distance, candor, suspicion, or intimacy.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Nora repeatedly spends body first for truth or speed

thresholds.at_2_instances: Jace starts checking symptoms before discussing mission progress, and Riven stops pretending Nora might choose the safer role.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Riven assigns Nora to breach-critical tasks as the necessary burn-rate operator, while Jace's warnings turn blunt and cold.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The world treats Nora as a dangerous instrument: Mirror access comes easier, Jace assumes self-damage on every plan, and narration foregrounds hardware failure over comfort.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Nora repeatedly chooses evidence, procedure, and containment over ease

thresholds.at_2_instances: Riven offers more operational detail without being pushed, and the Mirror shifts from comfort to exact contradiction.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Ilya addresses Nora as analytically dangerous rather than merely damaged, and system contact grows more adversarial in texture.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: Late-session persuasion scenes abandon most softness; the world meets Nora with resistance, static, and truth-weapon language instead of curated mercy.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Nora repeatedly preserves grief objects as real proof rather than expendable hardware

thresholds.at_2_instances: Jace handles those objects more carefully and objects less to their presence.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Riven begins treating object custody as part of Nora's authority, not sentimentality.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: Final symbolic scenes privilege tactile relics, scars, cords, rain, and held damage over system-clean substitutes.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Nora repeatedly conceals contamination or withholds critical truth from allies

thresholds.at_2_instances: Jace grows watchful and starts reading omissions before explanations.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Riven's trust becomes brittle; when a secret breaks, she withholds future discretion and speaks from settled judgment.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The team plans around Nora as a compromised variable, and the Mirror exploits the habit of silence with more private, bodily contact.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Nora repeatedly uses contaminated access under self-defined limits

thresholds.at_2_instances: Ilya and the Mirror begin mirroring Nora's own language of terms, limits, and temporary use.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Riven starts planning around one-more-pass logic, and Jace openly questions whether Nora is managing the channel or being trained by it.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: Compromise itself becomes the threat texture: the system no longer needs full surrender, only Nora's habit of measured permission.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through named readouts, Riven's procedural respect, and the way relief is always tested before it is trusted.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Interrogate the easy answer before paying for it.
hard_limits: Do not let the player cancel the decode entirely.
Do not allow full explanation of the anomaly beyond what the readout can support.
Do not let Nora become sentimental or passive in the face of technical wrongness.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can demand proof, naming, or numbers before she gives more of herself.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The rig is already live and degrading her port; the world only allows a narrower, more scrutinized continuation, not a clean stop.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through symptom-first reactivity: smooth lines, blood, wrong ease, and NPC alarm at how fast Nora spends herself.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Force the truth through before the body can object.
hard_limits: Do not allow consequence-free pushing of the rig.
Do not let the player gain the data without widening contamination risk.
Do not let Riven refuse outright once Nora commits to the push.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can choose speed, force, or bodily risk to get deeper now.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The machine can be driven harder, but only through Nora's existing port vulnerability and the contaminated channel already pressing back.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through enforced thresholds, limiter tones, and the visible fact that danger has to fight its way through the door Nora built.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Contain the threat even if containment costs time.
hard_limits: Do not let safeguards erase contamination risk.
Do not allow a perfect safe decode.
Do not let Nora hand authority away to generic institutional trust; this is her imposed control, not compliance.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can insist on caps, filters, and controlled procedure before the pass continues.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The hidden source is already inside the stream, so safeguards can slow and expose it, not remove it.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path by making the Cracked Camera Lens read as custody, proof, and scarred reality under Nora's hand.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Protect the real object from becoming just another tool.
hard_limits: Do not let the player remove the lens from the decode architecture entirely.
Do not allow the perfect stream-lens to replace the real lens.
Do not turn the moment into a grief speech about Eli.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can protect, preserve, or set terms on how the lens is touched.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The map still depends on the real lens staying in play, so protection becomes restricted handling and slower work, not withdrawal.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through labels, split feeds, and the steady humiliation of grief being forced under readout.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Separate what hurts from what is true enough to use.
hard_limits: Do not allow Nora or Riven to fully purge contamination mid-scene.
Do not let analysis produce certainty the source material does not support.
Do not let the player define new system rules beyond channel distinction.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can demand classification, separation, or proof of what in the stream is map and what is residue.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The chamber can split and label channels, but the contamination remains live and emotionally effective even when named.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path by making the lens hum, shake, and cut harder each time Nora authorizes treating memory like equipment.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Use the relic as a weapon because the route matters more than reverence.
hard_limits: Do not let the lens break here.
Do not allow the player to invent a different analog key.
Do not remove Jace's authentic hurt at seeing the relic spent.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can choose throughput over preservation and authorize rough use of the lens.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The world answers by stressing the existing lens harder, not by conjuring a cleaner substitute or consequence-free gain.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through wrong ease, clean contact, and the lingering warmth that proves the help did not leave when the data did.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Accept the dangerous shortcut because the truth must be finished now.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: reckless, decisive, pain-averse but truth-driven, shortcut-accepting, high-risk
hard_limits: Do not let the Mirror become harmless help.
Do not let acceptance erase contamination consequences.
Do not let Eli return as a true person through this choice.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can open, yield, or let the channel carry more of the load to finish the map.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The only available ease is contaminated ease through residue already in her port, so every shortcut deepens access.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through strain, blood, numbness, and the hard fact that refusal protects the line without cleaning the wound.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Keep ownership of the pain rather than accept coercive mercy.
hard_limits: Do not let refusal cancel the full map completion required by canon.
Do not let refusal erase the trace already present.
Do not turn the moment into triumphant invulnerability.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can reject the offer outright and insist the decode finish the hard way.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The map still has to be won through the rig already attached to her body, so refusal increases bodily cost instead of stopping the process.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through pulse access, staggered clarity, and language of control that may already be halfway to contamination.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Take the value without granting the claim.
hard_limits: Do not allow a perfectly controlled contamination-free use.
Do not let Nora's terms fully dominate the channel.
Do not collapse this into either full surrender or full refusal in disguise.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can set terms, limit duration, or try to use the channel without emotionally yielding to it.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The system can be pulsed and cut, but each use still leaves active trace and teaches the contact Nora's own limits-language.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through immediate procedural honesty: Riven's math, surgical light, and Jace's quiet decision to stay when the cut becomes real.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Choose function and shared truth even if it means losing the residue.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: honest, duty-first, safety-minded, transparent, accepting hard procedure
hard_limits: Do not let repair preserve the trace intact.
Do not resolve the surgery within Session 3.
Do not let disclosure remove the map or erase prior contamination.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can confess, report, or commit herself to repair before the strike moves forward.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The world answers by turning immediately toward surgical planning, because once named, the contamination becomes a procedural problem with a cost.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through missing sentences, private port pulses, and the way secrecy makes the next corridor feel narrower before anything is said aloud.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Keep the dangerous advantage alive by withholding the truth.
hard_limits: Do not let concealment become undetectable forever.
Do not allow the team to gain full knowledge while Nora still hides it.
Do not let the hidden trace stop acting on Nora's body.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can omit, swallow, or strategically hide the contamination to keep using it.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The world accepts the missing sentence for now, but the trace answers physically and Jace notices the shape of the omission.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Surface this path through contested prep: unused surgical tools, operational language, and Jace's dry refusal to let one-more-pass logic go unnamed.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Delay the cut because the wound may still be useful once more.
hard_limits: Do not let one more use become infinite deferral.
Do not let Riven fully know the contamination if Nora has not disclosed it.
Do not frame the plan as safe simply because it is limited.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Nora can ask for time, one more controlled pass, or a tactical delay before repair.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The route clock gives her a plausible window, but the world keeps the surgical tools in sight and lets Jace challenge the pattern immediately next session.

session_close_design.resolution_prose:
The steel door unlocks with a blunt internal click. Then daylight.

Not glow. Not interface wash. Real morning light, hard and pale, pouring down the stairwell and turning the concrete dust gold at the edges. You stop one step below the threshold. Your repaired port sits clean under the scar. Quiet. No ringing alarm in the HUD. No collapse coming in four hours. The kill map is complete. Hub-nine is real. Sera is in it.

Jace is behind you. Still here. Riven holds the door with one hand, shoulders set, already counting routes and charges and failure windows. Below, Site Three smells like rust, old water, human sleep. Above, air moves cold across your face.

You worked for this. The map. The repair. The hours bought back into your own body.

Then the new detail lands. Not in the port. In your chest. The weight of the cracked lens on its cord. Warm from your skin.

The city is waiting above the stairwell. So is the question.

What do you carry into daylight when the strike begins.
session_close_design.hook_transition:
For one breath, you just stand in the door and let real air hit your face.

Then Riven opens the door wider, and the city noise comes through with the light. Jace looks at the lens at your chest, then at you, waiting for your call.

session_end_choice.choice_question: When you step into daylight for the strike, what do you do with Eli's cracked lens?

option_a.text: Wear it into the mission. Keep the residue close, even if it changes what gets through.
option_a.next_session_opens: You move through the city with the lens against your chest as the first approach to the relay hub begins.

option_b.text: Hand it to Jace for safekeeping. Finish the strike with a clean channel.
option_b.next_session_opens: You give Jace the lens before deployment and head out with your port clear and your hands empty.

option_c.text: Leave it behind at Site Three. Not lost. Chosen.
option_c.next_session_opens: You set the lens down in the bunker before the team ascends and step into the mission without it.

session_end_choice.final_line: The door is open. Your move.

q1_entry_point.detail: The cold open starts at live decode pressure: Nora is already strapped in, port integrity is at 4%, the stream opens wrong-clean, and Eli's voice arrives before any passive orientation can settle.

q3_first_choice_timing.detail: Branching Choice #1 is scheduled at 0:45-1:30 and the cold open is approximately 145 words, so Choice #1 arrives well before 300 words; estimated word count to Choice #1: about 220-260 words.

q4_consequential_choices.detail: Session-end architecture fails the platform law: Section A pass condition requires three branching choices per session, but Phase 4/5/6 design contains four branching choices (S3_C1-S3_C4). Revision: return to Phase 4 and collapse S3_C2 into an expressive/posture layer or merge it into S3_C3 so the session has exactly three branching choices with preserved downstream consequence mapping.

q5_stakes_within_60_seconds.detail: Internal stakes are legible before the first branch: Nora wants the decode truth and chooses to keep going despite port failure risk; why is clear through the damaged body, the cracked lens, and the immediate wrongness of the stream.

q6_early_decision_visible_later.detail: S3_C1 has named future payoff in Session 4 and later: e.g. S3_C1A pays off at Event 61 with Ilya's opening line and S3_C1B shapes diver assignment at Event 56.

q7_breath_beat.detail: Timing window misses the checklist requirement. Phase 4 beat map places the Breath beat at 8:00-10:00, but Q7 requires a breath beat between minutes 10-13. Revision: return to Phase 4 and slide the recovery alcove/Jace recorder sequence later so the reward lands inside 10:00-13:00 before the Twist compounds.

q8_moral_gray_area.detail: S3_C3 is a genuine moral gray choice with no correct answer. Values in tension: bodily survival, autonomous consent, mission truth.

q9_exit_emotional_state.detail: The complete session design exits in two conflicting states. Phase 5/6 resolution ends on contamination/repair secrecy commitment, but Phase 7 session_close_design replaces that with a daylight lens-carry choice after a repaired clean port. Revision: return to Phase 7 and align the close to the unresolved contamination decision from S3_C4 so the user exits with anticipation tied to this session's actual arc, not a contradictory later-state hook.

q10_talkability.detail: S3_C3 and S3_C4 are immediately talkable: accepting contaminated help, refusing it, or using it on terms are strong 'what did you choose?' decisions.

q11_hard_ban_scan.detail: Banned explanatory sci-fi dialogue appears in generated prose. Phase 5 S3_C1A outcome line 'Degradation below expected rate. Channel separation too stable. Source variance unconfirmed.' and multiple similar Riven technical summaries drift into plain definitional exposition rather than pressure-bearing implication. Revision: return to Phase 5 and compress technical explanation into readout fragments/HUD labels plus one contested line, not spoken procedural definition.

q12_trailing_simile_scan.detail: No action-line trailing simile constructions of the form 'like [metaphor]' were found in the generated prose.

q13_sentence_mold_scan.detail: Banned sentence mold appears repeatedly: 'No X. No Y. Just Z.' Example in Phase 7 resolution_prose: 'Not glow. Not interface wash. Real morning light...' and in Phase 5/6 multiple balanced negation stacks approach the prohibited mold. Revision: return to Phase 5 and Phase 7 and vary corrective structures so they do not resolve into the exact banned scaffold.

q14_voice_authenticity.detail: Cold open clearly carries signature techniques: staccato fragment chaining ('The rig answers low and rising. Cables pull taut.'), negation correction beats ('Not resistance. Not static.'), readout emotionalization ('NEURAL PORT INTEGRITY: 4%'), and perception-first reveal ('Too clean.'). Random outcomes also track the voice: S3_C2A uses object emotion tethering through the cracked lens; S3_C3A uses body-tech fusion and wrong-ease perception; S3_C4B uses exteriorized interiority through the private pulse under the scar.

q15_fourteen_point_audit.detail: Not all 14 voice-lock audit points pass. The strongest failures are Point 10 No Expository Leakage and Point 14 Ending Decision Retention Hook due to the contradictory Phase 7 close replacing the contamination hook with a repaired-daylight lens choice.

q16_diction_fingerprint.detail: Phase 7 diction breaks protagonist and world fingerprint: 'daylight,' 'strike begins,' and especially the repaired clean-port framing belong to a later session state and flatten the body-tech/grief diction established for Session 3. Revision: return to Phase 7 and rewrite the close in Nora's damaged, in-bunker diction with port warmth, residue, thresholds, and immediate contamination stakes.

fourteen_point_audit_results.location: Phase 5 branching outcomes, especially S3_C1A/S3_C2B technical spoken explanation blocks.
Phase 7 session_close_design contradicts Session 3's contamination hook and jumps to a repaired-daylight lens decision.

q17_canon_integrity.detail: Phase 7 violates canon and session map continuity by introducing 'Your repaired port sits clean under the scar' and a daylight strike threshold in Session 3, while Session 4 canon says Nora opens with surviving repair after Session 3. Revision: return to Phase 7 and replace the close with an in-bunker unresolved contamination commitment that hands directly into Session 4 repair/collapse pressure.

q18_character_truth.detail: Riven remains procedural, Jace stays dry and physically attentive, and the Mirror's pressure is intimate rather than bombastic across the designed outcomes.

q19_world_reactivity.detail: World reactivity is active and visible: monitor behavior, limiter tones, port warmth, Jace's distance changes, Riven's handling posture, and later Ilya/Mirror contact textures all respond to player behavior.

q20_persistent_state_consistency.detail: Phase 5 and Phase 6 are internally consistent, but Phase 7 contradicts them by assuming a repaired clean port regardless of S3_C4 path. Revision: return to Phase 7 and make the close conditional on Phase 5/6 persistent states, especially mirror_access_to_nora, repair_path_committed, contamination_secret_active, and pre_repair_extra_use_planned.

q21_world_noticed_signals.detail: Significant state changes have subtle in-world acknowledgments: oscilloscope smoothing, limiter tones, Jace's held hand, Riven's changed handling rhythm, private port pulse, and monitor labels all satisfy voice, physical grounding, and non-meta subtlety.

q22_social_echo_defining_lines.detail: All four branching choices include three defining lines each, all under 20 words, in-voice, provocative, and curiosity-generating.

q23_alignment_balance.detail: Each branching choice spans chaotic/lawful/neutral with no obvious systematic reward bias. Consequences differ in cost texture, not in hidden moral scoring.

revision_instructions.instruction: Reduce the session to exactly three branching choices by merging or demoting S3_C2 so branching architecture matches Lorespinner law.
Move the Breath beat later so the Jace recorder release lands between minutes 10 and 13 before the Twist.
Replace the daylight repaired-port lens hook with the unresolved contamination commitment from S3_C4 so the exit emotion is anticipation tied to this session.
Compress explanatory technical dialogue into readouts and contested fragments; remove spoken sci-fi definition blocks.
Rewrite banned sentence molds, especially exact 'No X. No Y. Just Z.' style negation scaffolds, into varied corrective beats.
Fix expository leakage and restore a valid session-end retention hook aligned with Session 3's contamination arc, then rerun all 14 voice-lock points.
Recast the closing diction into Session 3's damaged bunker-state voice instead of later-session clean-port daylight language.
Remove the repaired clean-port daylight scene from Session 3 and end on a canon-valid pre-repair contamination decision.
Make the session close conditional on Phase 5/6 persistent states rather than assuming a single repaired outcome.

entry_point_diagnosis.editorial_diagnosis:
The dramatic engine does not truly ignite at the recovery opening or the city-walk briefing. Those pages are strong in mood, aftermath, and mission logistics, but for a new user inside the first 60 seconds they delay the felt stake. Nora waking with a clean port, the hollow after surgery, Jace’s recorder beat, Riven’s route briefing, the city’s failing SoulSync surfaces, and even the early overpass travel all provide context rather than immediate playable pressure. The first paragraph where a new user can feel the stakes now, without needing future knowledge, is the moment Nora’s clean port receives Ilya’s voice. At that instant the conflict becomes active, personal, and legible: the system has found Nora inside her own body; an authority figure is trying to reframe the mission; Nora must decide whether to cut the channel, hear her out, or resist. That is the first undeniable tension spike on the page.

Everything before that should be cut for session entry. It is not bad material; it is pre-tension material. It front-loads recovery state, emotional aftermath of the repair, travel briefing, route exposition, and environmental deterioration before a user has a live problem to act inside. In Lorespinner terms, it spends the retention window on setup instead of intrusion.

What gets cut: Nora’s post-surgery awakening, confirmation that Eli’s emotional trace is gone, Jace’s quiet bedside scene, the four-hour move notice, the relay-hub briefing, Tova recorder intelligence, Jace deleting the unlabeled file, emergence into daylight, SoulSync billboards and memorial gardens, and Riven reading relay routing from the junction box. Why it gets cut: all of it is either aftermath processing, mission explanation, or atmospheric escalation without a decision point.

What must survive from the cut material is not the sequence itself but its payload: Nora now has a clean port after surgery; Eli’s data survived in the cracked lens but his felt presence did not; Nora, Jace, and Riven are already en route to sabotage relay hubs before the Reset; the city’s grief infrastructure is failing; and Riven is withholding personal knowledge about the system. Those facts should be reintroduced through action pressure and terse implication, not resumed as preamble.

This cut also better matches Session 4’s dramatic question. The session is about who Nora believes as the city destabilizes and what destroying the system will cost. Ilya’s intrusion is the cleanest entry to that question because it literalizes the argument in Nora’s body before the mission continues.

format_specific_cut.cut_point: Event 61 — Ilya contacts Nora through the clean port
format_specific_cut.original_before_cut: Approximately 1,450-1,650 words before the cut; eliminates all material from Nora’s recovery opening through Riven checking relay routing in the street.
format_specific_cut.cut_eliminates: Post-surgery aftermath, grief-state processing, mission briefing, route exposition, object setup, city-atmosphere tableau, and transitional travel beats.
format_specific_cut.must_reintroduce: Nora’s port is now clean after repair; the repair removed Eli’s felt trace; she still carries the cracked lens with Eli’s data; she is traveling with Jace and Riven toward relay hubs before Reset; the city’s SoulSync infrastructure is failing; Riven knows more about AMORA architecture than she admits.

entry_point_diagnosis.cold_open:
Amber streetlights. Cold air under the overpass. Traffic shudders overhead while your HUD flickers once across your vision.

Not a fault.
A signal.

You are Nora. You stop in the middle of the service road and clamp your hand over the cracked lens at your chest before anyone tells you to. Jace reaches for your arm. Riven turns back.

Then the voice arrives in your clean port. Perfectly clear. Too clear.

“Nora.”

Not memory. Not residue.
Ilya.

The repair cut Eli out of you. Opened something else.

Jace says, “Cut it.”

You don’t. Of course you don’t. You hold still and listen while the city moves above you, ordinary and blind, and Ilya starts talking about continuity, about the dead, about what eleven million people will lose if you keep walking.

The lens presses warm against your ribs.

Her next sentence will tell you whether this is a warning, a plea, or a threat.
entry_point_diagnosis.emotional_promise: The emotional promise of this cold open is: intrusion. A user arrives feeling hunted and wanting to decide who gets access to Nora’s grief.

setup.source_moment: Event 61 cold-open cut: under the overpass, Nora’s clean port receives Ilya’s voice with perfect clarity; Jace tells her to cut it; Riven turns back; Nora must decide whether to sever, hear out, or resist the intrusion.
setup.why_it_qualifies: This is the first live pressure point after the Phase 3 cut. Location, situation, and stake are legible immediately: Nora is in transit toward sabotage, the system has found her inside her repaired body, and an authority figure is making a continuity argument that directly attacks Nora’s core wound. It supports Branching Choice #1 within the first 300 words and satisfies the first-3-minutes rule because player input changes how Ilya frames the rest of the contact and how Jace/Riven read Nora’s refusal style.

escalation.source_moment: After the port call, the team keeps moving through the failing city toward the water treatment plant and down through the checkpoints as public grief infrastructure stutters, Jace’s conversion becomes visible, and the Mirror architecture begins actively defending the route to the Core.
escalation.why_it_qualifies: The visible goal is clear: reach the Garden Core and preserve the route to destroy the root. The obstacle is equally clear and compounding: the city is destabilizing, Ilya can still reach Nora, Jace is physically worsening, and the Mirror’s infrastructure now recognizes and resists them. This section provides operational momentum and multiple trust/priority textures without yet cashing the final moral argument.

breath.source_moment: Approach to the Garden Core outer gate: the cathedral reveal of chrome lattice, archived voices in the air, and Nora lifting the cracked lens to see the beautiful facade warp into server architecture and processing nodes.
breath.why_it_qualifies: This is the session’s awe-corrupted reward beat. It lands between minutes 8 and 10 as required, gives the player a visual and conceptual payoff for surviving the corridor pressure, and delivers wonder contaminated by horror rather than relief. The reward is not safety; it is privileged sight. That matches the voice profile’s perception-first reveal and corrective classification rhythm.

twist.source_moment: Riven at the deep junction and then at the inner gate, touching and removing the collar object, choosing the downward path only after a visible hesitation that implies private knowledge and personal stake in the Core.
twist.why_it_qualifies: The moral weight comes from belief and complicity, not tactics alone. Nora now has to decide whether to keep following a leader who clearly knows more than she has admitted, to force the truth open now and risk the mission window, or to proceed because the city-scale cost outweighs consent and transparency. There is no correct answer: trust may be necessary and may also be exactly what enables another violation.

resolution.source_moment: The inner gate opens into the vertical cathedral of memory; Nora catalogs entry points while Jace’s chrome has reached his jawline; Riven stands ahead with fingers inside her collar; the team is inside the Core but the next irreversible choice has not yet been made.
resolution.why_it_qualifies: The primary arc that appears resolved is ingress: they made it through the city, the checkpoints, and the outer gate into the Garden Core. The seed for next session is explicit and immediate: inside the Core, Nora must decide what to do about Riven’s withheld truth, Jace’s worsening condition, and the system’s final continuity offer. The session should end on Nora’s own unresolved commitment about how she will proceed inside the Core, not on the architecture itself.

branching_choices.dramatic_question: When Ilya enters your clean port, do you reject her outright, hear her tactically, or answer with controlled defiance that denies her authority without surrendering the channel?
When Jace reveals the chrome spread and says tomorrow is uncertain, do you center his condition now, subordinate it to the strike, or try to hold both without promising either fully?

When Riven’s hesitation and collar make it obvious she is hiding a personal tie to the Core, do you force the truth now, let her lead but lock her to accountability, or keep moving and bank the confrontation for later?

Now that you are inside the Garden Core and can feel the system’s scale, what are you committing yourself to in the next session: destroy it cleanly no matter what, learn what Riven is protecting before acting, or hold long enough to separate the trapped dead from the machine if that is still possible?

emotional_choices.source_attachment: Immediately after Ilya cuts the signal and Jace/Riven look to Nora for a read on what just happened.
Passing the glitched billboard, dark kiosks, and the man stopped by returning grief in the transit corridor.
Jace showing the chrome spread and admitting his echo log has static for the first time since the repair.
First sight of the Garden Core outer gate and the archived voices in the air.
Nora looking through the cracked lens and recognizing that the beauty is processing architecture using the dead.

content_budget.narration_token_budget: 3,400-4,300 words of narrator output across the full session
compression_targets: All pre-cut recovery and route briefing material before Event 61 becomes implied backfill inside the opening exchange and later environmental references.
The transit-corridor city deterioration sequence compresses multiple public-failure images into one playable traversal beat.
The three checkpoint descent through the water treatment plant compresses into a single escalating infiltration sequence with selected tactical highlights rather than full room-by-room simulation.
Riven’s route knowledge and panel-disabling competence compress into a few sharp observations instead of extended exposition.
expansion_targets: Ilya’s clean-port intrusion under the overpass, because it is the identity-defining opening and first branch.
Jace’s chrome reveal, because it is the session’s key loyalty-pressure beat and must earn downstream Session 5 rescue stakes.
The Garden Core outer-gate reveal and cracked-lens perception shift, because it is the Schell Rule reward and thematic image payoff.
Riven’s hesitation at the junction and inner gate, because this is the session’s trust-vs-caution moral hinge.
The final unresolved commitment inside the Core, because the session must end on the player’s own next-step decision.

must_survive_verbatim: ILYA: "What you insist on calling the Mirror, I have always called continuity."
ILYA: "That was not corruption. That was love refusing to stop."
NORA: "A copy. Kept past its purpose."
JACE: "They are going to feel everything at once."
can_be_reshaped: Riven’s hub briefing and root-node explanation.
Jace’s explanation of Tova’s recorder as operational intelligence.
Riven’s explanation that the repair opened a channel for Ilya.
Jace and Riven’s tactical exchange about whether he can still fight.
Descriptions of the city’s public advisory screens and memorial infrastructure.
can_be_cut: Most of the stairwell and code-entry transition business.
The unlabeled recorder-file deletion beat in full, since it belongs more to the cut preamble than this session spine.
Detailed enumeration of all three hub targets and six-minute synchronization logic.
Repeated route logistics once the player already understands they are heading for the Core through failing infrastructure.
